34227.title: Earnings Instability
34227.authors: Peter Ganong, Pascal J. Noel, Christina Patterson, Joseph S. Vavra, Alexander Weinberg
34227.abstract: This paper uses high-frequency administrative data to show that the majority of U.S. workers experience substantial month-to-month fluctuations in pay, even within ongoing employment relationships. This earnings instability is pervasive, but it has been masked in past analysis of annual data. Moreover, this instability is unequally distributed: lower-income, hourly workers face more instability than higher-income, salaried workers. This is because earnings instability arises in large part from firm-driven fluctuations in hours. This earnings instability is a meaningful source of economic risk: we provide causal evidence that it increases consumption volatility and also leads to greater job separations, and we find that workers have a high willingness to pay to reduce earnings instability. These findings suggest that short-term earnings risk is a significant and previously underappreciated feature of the labor market.
34227.zh_abstract: 本文利用高频行政数据表明，大多数美国工人在持续的雇佣关系中，甚至在同一雇佣关系内，都会经历显著的月度薪酬波动。这种收入不稳定性普遍存在，但在以往基于年度数据的分析中被掩盖了。此外，这种不稳定性分布不均：低收入、按小时计酬的工人比高收入、受薪工人面临更多的不稳定性。这是因为收入不稳定性在很大程度上源于企业驱动的工时波动。这种收入不稳定性是经济风险的一个重要来源：我们提供了因果证据，表明它增加了消费波动性，并导致更高的离职率，同时我们发现工人有很高的意愿支付来减少收入不稳定性。这些发现表明，短期收入风险是劳动力市场一个显著且此前未被充分认识的特征。

34226.title: Measuring FDI and Trade-related Interdependence Across Countries: The Case of the United States and China
34226.zh_title: 衡量各国间的外国直接投资与贸易相互依存度：以美国和中国为例
34226.authors: Zhi Wang, Shang-Jin Wei, Xinding Yu, Kunfu Zhu
34226.abstract: Based on the new integrated accounting framework of global supply chains (GSC) (Wang, Wei, Yu, and Zhu, 2025), we derive three types of economic dependence (producers’ dependence on upstream supplies, producers’ dependence on downstream markets, and consumers’ dependence on supply chains) that take into account of the presence of foreign invested firms as well as international trade. To measure indirect value flows between the origin and destination countries that are mediated through third economies, we show a need to go beyond both trade-in-value added and gross trade statistics. As an application, we derive new measures of inter-dependence between the United States and China.
34226.zh_abstract: 基于全球供应链（GSC）的新综合核算框架（Wang, Wei, Yu, and Zhu, 2025），我们推导出三种类型的经济依存度（生产者对上游供应的依存度、生产者对下游市场的依存度以及消费者对供应链的依存度），这些依存度同时考虑了外资企业的存在和国际贸易。为了衡量通过第三方经济体中介的、始发国与目的国之间的间接价值流动，我们表明需要超越贸易增加值统计和总贸易统计。作为应用，我们推导出美国和中国之间相互依存度的新衡量指标。

34225.title: The Industrial Revolution in the United States: 1790-1870
34225.abstract: This chapter explores the distinctive trajectory of American industrialization up to 1870, emphasizing how the United States adapted and transformed British technologies to suit its unique economic and resource conditions. Rather than a straightforward transfer of innovations, the chapter argues that American industrial development was shaped by path-dependent processes and historical contingencies—such as the Embargo Act of 1807 and government sponsorship of firearms production—that enabled the emergence of a domestic innovation ecosystem. The chapter offers fresh insights into how high-pressure steam engines, vertically integrated textile mills, and precision manufacturing techniques evolved in response to labor scarcity, capital constraints, and abundant natural resources. A particularly novel contribution is the detailed analysis of how American manufacturers substituted mechanization and organizational innovation for skilled labor, leading to the development of technologies that were not only distinct from their British counterparts but also foundational for the Second Industrial Revolution. The chapter also highlights the democratization of invention, showing how economic incentives and institutional support fostered widespread innovation among ordinary citizens. By integrating technological, economic, and institutional perspectives, this chapter provides a compelling explanation for why the United States developed a robust manufacturing sector despite seemingly unfavorable initial conditions.
34225.zh_abstract: 本章探讨了截至1870年美国工业化的独特轨迹，强调了美国如何适应并改造英国技术，以适应当地独特的经济和资源条件。本章认为，美国工业发展并非简单的创新转移，而是由路径依赖过程和历史偶然性——例如1807年的《禁运法案》和政府对枪支生产的赞助——所塑造，这些因素促成了国内创新生态系统的出现。本章提供了关于高压蒸汽机、垂直整合的纺织厂和精密制造技术如何因应劳动力稀缺、资本约束和丰富自然资源而演变的新见解。一个特别新颖的贡献是详细分析了美国制造商如何用机械化和组织创新替代熟练劳动力，从而发展出不仅与英国同行截然不同、而且为第二次工业革命奠定基础的技术。本章还强调了发明的民主化，展示了经济激励和制度支持如何促进普通公民中的广泛创新。通过整合技术、经济和制度视角，本章为美国为何在看似不利的初始条件下发展出强大的制造业部门提供了令人信服的解释。

34224.title: Characterizing Optimality in Dynamic Settings: A Monotonicity-based Approach
34224.zh_title: 动态环境中最优性的刻画：一种基于单调性的方法
34224.authors: Zhuokai Huang, Demian Pouzo, Andrés Rodríguez-Clare
34224.abstract: We develop a novel analytical method for studying optimal paths in dynamic optimization problems under general monotonicity conditions. The method centers on a locator function—a simple object constructed directly from the model’s primitives—whose roots identify interior steady states and whose slope determines their local stability. Under strict concavity of the payoff function, the locator function also characterizes basins of attraction, yielding a complete description of qualitative dynamics. Without concavity, it can still deliver sharp results: if the function is single crossing from above, its root identifies a globally stable steady state; if the locator function is inverted-U-shaped with two interior roots (a typical case), only the higher root can be a locally stable interior steady state. The locator function further enables comparative statics of steady states with respect to parameters through direct analysis of its derivatives. These results are obtained without solving the full dynamic program. We illustrate the approach using a generalized neoclassical growth model, a rational (un)fitness model, and a learning-by-doing economy.
34224.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种新颖的分析方法，用于研究在一般单调性条件下动态优化问题中的最优路径。该方法围绕一个定位函数展开——这是一个直接从模型原始参数构建的简单对象——其根识别内部稳态，其斜率决定局部稳定性。在支付函数严格凹性的条件下，定位函数还能刻画吸引域，从而提供定性动态的完整描述。在没有凹性的情况下，它仍能得出精确结果：如果该函数是上单交的，其根识别出一个全局稳定的稳态；如果定位函数呈倒U形且有两个内部根（典型情况），则只有较高的根可能是局部稳定的内部稳态。定位函数还允许通过直接分析其导数来对稳态进行关于参数的比较静态分析。这些结果无需求解完整的动态规划即可获得。我们使用一个广义新古典增长模型、一个理性（不）适应模型和一个干中学经济体来阐述该方法。

34223.title: Artificial Writing and Automated Detection
34223.zh_title: 人工智能写作与自动检测
34223.abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) tools are increasingly used for written deliverables. This has created demand for distinguishing human-generated text from AI-generated text at scale, e.g., ensuring assignments were completed by students, product reviews written by actual customers, etc. A decision-maker aiming to implement a detector in practice must consider two key statistics: the False Negative Rate (FNR), which corresponds to the proportion of AI-generated text that is falsely classified as human, and the False Positive Rate (FPR), which corresponds to the proportion of human-written text that is falsely classified as AI-generated. We evaluate three leading commercial detectors—Pangram, OriginalityAI, GPTZero—and an open-source one —RoBERTa—on their performance in minimizing these statistics using a large corpus spanning genres, lengths, and models. Commercial detectors outperform open-source, with Pangram achieving near-zero FNR and FPR rates that remain robust across models, threshold rules, ultra-short passages, "stubs" (≤ 50 words) and ’humanizer’ tools. A decision-maker may weight one type of error (Type I vs. Type II) as more important than the other. To account for such a preference, we introduce a framework where the decision-maker sets a policy cap—a detector-independent metric reflecting tolerance for false positives or negatives. We show that Pangram is the only tool to satisfy a strict cap (FPR ≤ 0.005) without sacrificing accuracy. This framework is especially relevant given the uncertainty surrounding how AI may be used at different stages of writing, where certain uses may be encouraged (e.g., grammar correction) but may be difficult to separate from other uses.
34223.zh_abstract: 人工智能工具越来越多地被用于书面交付物。这产生了大规模区分人类生成文本与人工智能生成文本的需求，例如，确保作业由学生完成、产品评论由实际客户撰写等。旨在实践中实施检测器的决策者必须考虑两个关键统计量：假阴性率，即被错误归类为人类的人工智能生成文本的比例；以及假阳性率，即被错误归类为人工智能生成的人类撰写文本的比例。我们使用一个涵盖多种体裁、长度和模型的大型语料库，评估了三款领先的商业检测器——Pangram、OriginalityAI、GPTZero——以及一款开源检测器RoBERTa，在最小化这些统计量方面的表现。商业检测器优于开源检测器，其中Pangram实现了接近零的假阴性率和假阳性率，且这些比率在模型、阈值规则、超短段落、“片段”（≤50词）和“人性化”工具中保持稳健。决策者可能认为一种错误类型（第一类错误与第二类错误）比另一种更重要。为考虑这种偏好，我们引入了一个框架，其中决策者设定一个政策上限——一个独立于检测器的指标，反映对假阳性或假阴性的容忍度。我们表明，Pangram是唯一能在不牺牲准确性的情况下满足严格上限（假阳性率≤0.005）的工具。鉴于人工智能在写作不同阶段可能被使用的方式存在不确定性——某些用途可能被鼓励（例如语法纠正）但难以与其他用途区分——这一框架尤其相关。

34222.title: Missing Markets for Innovation: Evidence from New Uses for Existing Drugs
34222.zh_title: 创新的缺失市场：来自现有药物新用途的证据
34222.authors: Eric Budish, Maya M. Durvasula, Benjamin N. Roin, Heidi L. Williams
34222.abstract: We investigate missing markets for innovation: contexts where intellectual property rights necessary to incentivize research investment are either unavailable or unenforceable. A simple theoretical model formalizes the conditions that yield missing investment. We identify an empirical setting—research into new uses for existing drugs— with sharp variation in the enforceability of intellectual property rights on comparable inventions. We show that when intellectual property rights become unenforceable, research investment and commercialization nearly cease. Estimates of the value of this missing investment are in the trillions of dollars. We discuss the implications of these findings for the design of innovation policy.
34222.zh_abstract: 我们研究了创新的缺失市场：即激励研究投资所需的知识产权要么不可用、要么不可执行的情境。一个简单的理论模型形式化了导致投资缺失的条件。我们确定了一个实证环境——对现有药物新用途的研究——其中可比发明的知识产权可执行性存在显著差异。我们表明，当知识产权变得不可执行时，研究投资和商业化几乎停止。对这种缺失投资价值的估计高达数万亿美元。我们讨论了这些发现对创新政策设计的启示。
34222.meta: Programs：EH, IO, LE, PR；JEL：D47, I10, I18, K23, L65, O0, O3, O30, O34

34221.title: College Loans and Human Capital Investment
34221.zh_title: 大学贷款与人力资本投资
34221.authors: Chao Fu, Hsuan-Chih (Luke) Lin, Atsuko Tanaka
34221.abstract: College loans serve as a double-edged sword for human capital investment: While they facilitate access to education, the burden of repayment may distort post-education investments in human capital. We examine the role of college loans and loan repayment policies through a structural model in which heterogeneous individuals, faced with borrowing limits, make dynamic decisions on consumption, borrowing/saving, labor supply, and costly human capital investment (via both college education and on-the-job learning a la Ben-Porath (1967)). We estimate two versions of the model using data from the NLSY79: one with natural borrowing limits and another with parameterized limits. Counterfactual simulations based on both models suggest that, relative to the standard fixed repayment plan, income-driven repayment (IDR) plans modestly increase educational attainment, lifetime earnings, and individual welfare. Although some generous IDR plans may result in losses for the loan program itself, overall government revenue is higher under IDRs than under the standard repayment plan when lifetime income taxes are accounted for, creating a win-win scenario for both individual welfare and government revenue.
34221.zh_abstract: 大学贷款对人力资本投资而言是一把双刃剑：虽然它们促进了教育机会的获取，但还款负担可能会扭曲教育后的人力资本投资。我们通过一个结构模型来考察大学贷款和贷款还款政策的作用，在该模型中，面临借贷约束的异质性个体在消费、借贷/储蓄、劳动供给和昂贵的人力资本投资（通过大学教育和在职学习，如Ben-Porath（1967）所述）方面做出动态决策。我们使用NLSY79数据估计了两个版本的模型：一个具有自然借贷约束，另一个具有参数化的约束。基于两个模型的反事实模拟表明，相对于标准的固定还款计划，收入驱动还款计划适度提高了教育成就、终生收入和个人福利。尽管一些慷慨的收入驱动还款计划可能导致贷款计划本身的损失，但在考虑终生所得税后，收入驱动还款计划下的政府总收入高于标准还款计划，为个人福利和政府收入创造了双赢局面。

34220.title: How Do Banks Compete? Evidence from Advertising Videos
34220.zh_title: 银行如何竞争？来自广告视频的证据
34220.authors: Xugan Chen, Allen Hu, Song Ma
34220.abstract: This paper studies how banks compete through a novel lens: the content of advertising videos. Using video embeddings, we identify three competitive dimensions: pricing, service quality, and trust-building emotional appeals. We build a framework connecting advertising content to franchise value and monetary policy transmission. Empirical evidence is consistent with model predictions. Banks with high local market shares compete on service and trust while downplaying pricing. New entrants compete primarily on pricing. Banks lacking pricing or service advantages lean on emotional appeals. Non-price advertising strengthens the deposit franchise, enabling banks to maintain wider spreads during monetary tightening and shaping monetary transmission.
34220.zh_abstract: 本文通过一个新颖的视角——广告视频的内容——研究银行如何竞争。利用视频嵌入技术，我们识别出三个竞争维度：定价、服务质量和建立信任的情感诉求。我们构建了一个将广告内容与特许权价值和货币政策传导联系起来的框架。实证证据与模型预测一致。本地市场份额高的银行在服务和信任方面竞争，同时淡化定价。新进入者主要在定价方面竞争。缺乏定价或服务优势的银行则依赖情感诉求。非价格广告增强了存款特许权，使银行在货币紧缩期间能够维持更宽的利差，并塑造了货币传导。
34220.meta: Programs：CF, IO, PR；JEL：G2, G3, G5, M3

34219.title: Laboratories of Autocracy: Landscape of Central–Local Dynamics in China’s Policy Universe
34219.zh_title: 独裁的实验室：中国政策宇宙中的央地动态格局
34219.authors: Kaicheng Luo, Shaoda Wang, David Y. Yang
34219.abstract: Using a comprehensive collection of 3.7 million Chinese policy documents and government work reports spanning the past two decades, we identify 115,679 distinct policies and systematically trace their initiation and diffusion. Our analysis reveals three key findings. First, China’s policymaking has historically been highly decentralized, with local bureaucrats playing crucial roles in both creating new policies and spreading them. Second, since 2013, policymaking has become substantially more centralized, driven primarily by changing bureaucratic incentives—bottom-up innovation is no longer rewarded, while strict enforcement of central policies is. Third, our examination of industrial policies shows that centralization affects both policy suitability and effectiveness. Top-down industrial policies tend to align poorly with local conditions and are less effective at driving industrial growth, highlighting centralization’s costs. On the other hand, under decentralization, competition among local officials can distort policy diffusion, also undermining effectiveness. Our quantitative assessment of both distortions indicates that economic costs of centralizing policymaking in China have significantly outweighed its benefits.
34219.zh_abstract: 利用过去二十年收集的370万份中国政策文件和政府工作报告，我们识别出115,679项不同的政策，并系统地追溯了它们的发起和扩散。我们的分析揭示了三个关键发现。首先，中国的政策制定历来高度分散，地方官僚在创建新政策和推广政策方面都发挥着关键作用。其次，自2013年以来，政策制定变得显著更加集中，这主要是由不断变化的官僚激励所驱动——自下而上的创新不再受到奖励，而严格执行中央政策则受到鼓励。第三，我们对产业政策的考察表明，集中化既影响政策的适宜性也影响其有效性。自上而下的产业政策往往与地方条件匹配不佳，且在推动产业增长方面效果较差，凸显了集中化的成本。另一方面，在分散化下，地方官员之间的竞争可能扭曲政策扩散，同样损害有效性。我们对这两种扭曲的量化评估表明，中国政策制定集中化的经济成本已显著超过其收益。

34218.title: Robust Bounds on Optimal Tax Progressivity
34218.zh_title: 最优税收累进性的稳健边界
34218.authors: Anmol Bhandari, Jaroslav Borovička, Yuki Yao
34218.abstract: This paper studies optimal tax design when the cross-sectional distribution of types may be misspecified, and the government acts cautiously vis-à-vis these misspecifications. In models without such concerns, fat-tailed distributions imply positive—often high—top marginal tax rates. We demonstrate that even vanishingly small misspecification concerns overturn this finding, driving top marginal tax rates to zero. Calibrating concerns to observed variation in income distributions shows that taxes for below-average incomes remain essentially unchanged, while progressivity for high-income earners is substantially reduced.
34218.zh_abstract: 本文研究了当类型的横截面分布可能被错误设定，且政府对这些错误设定采取谨慎态度时的最优税收设计。在没有此类担忧的模型中，厚尾分布意味着正的——通常是高的——最高边际税率。我们证明，即使小到可以忽略不计的错误设定担忧也会推翻这一结论，将最高边际税率降至零。将担忧程度校准至观察到的收入分布变化表明，低于平均收入水平的税收基本保持不变，而高收入者的累进性则大幅降低。
34218.meta: Programs：EFG, PE；JEL：D61, D81, D82, E61, H21

34217.title: Global Working Hours
34217.abstract: This paper uses labor force surveys from 160 countries to build a new microdatabase on hours worked covering 97% of the world population in cross section. We also construct time series spanning over 20 years in 86 countries. Hours worked per adult slightly decline with GDP per capita but are weakly correlated with development overall. Hours worked by the young (aged 15-19) and elderly (aged 60+) fall with development, driven entirely by growing school attendance and public pension coverage. Hours worked among prime-age adults (aged 20-59) are stable with development but undergo a great gender reshuffling: falling male hours per worker have been exactly offset by increases in female labor force participation in many countries. Labor income taxes are strongly negatively related to hours worked across countries. This correlation is attenuated when controlling for social spending and disappears when further controlling for working hours regulations. Both social spending and working hours regulations are associated with lower hours worked.
34217.zh_abstract: 本文利用来自160个国家的劳动力调查，构建了一个新的微观工作时间数据库，横截面覆盖了全球97%的人口。我们还构建了86个国家超过20年的时间序列数据。每个成年人的工作时间随人均GDP略有下降，但与整体发展的相关性较弱。青年（15-19岁）和老年（60岁以上）人群的工作时间随发展而下降，这完全是由入学率和公共养老金覆盖率的提高所驱动的。壮年成年人（20-59岁）的工作时间随发展保持稳定，但经历了巨大的性别重组：在许多国家，男性每个工人的工作时间下降恰好被女性劳动参与率的增加所抵消。劳动所得税与各国的工作时间呈强烈负相关。当控制社会支出时，这种相关性减弱；当进一步控制工作时间法规时，这种相关性消失。社会支出和工作时间法规都与较低的工作时间相关。

34216.title: When Decentralization Works: Leadership, Local Needs, and Student Achievement
34216.zh_title: 分权何时有效：领导力、地方需求与学生成绩
34216.abstract: This paper studies when decentralization improves public service delivery. I analyze a Chicago reform that awarded select principals greater autonomy over budgets and operations while holding resources largely unchanged. A meta-analysis of similar reforms shows substantial heterogeneity, including both positive and negative effects. Building on insights from public finance, contract design, and psychology, I argue that the returns to autonomy depend on the capacity of local decision-makers (i.e., principals in this context) and the alignment of their objectives with those of central authorities. Event-study estimates show that, on average, increased autonomy improved achievement by about 0.1 standard deviations, effects comparable to resource-intensive interventions but achieved at minimal cost. However, deconvolution analysis reveals substantial heterogeneity, with both negative and positive effects. Design-based evidence supports the theoretical predictions; high-performing principals benefit more, reallocating resources effectively (e.g., reducing class sizes), and schools with atypical student populations benefit more and may tailor services to local needs. These results highlight that local capacity, aligned incentives, and heterogeneity are central to the success of decentralization reforms.
34216.zh_abstract: 本文研究了分权何时能改善公共服务提供。我分析了芝加哥的一项改革，该改革赋予选定的校长更大的预算和运营自主权，同时基本保持资源不变。对类似改革的元分析显示出显著的异质性，包括正面和负面效应。基于公共财政、契约设计和心理学的见解，我认为自主权的回报取决于地方决策者（在此背景下即校长）的能力以及他们目标与中央当局目标的一致性。事件研究估计显示，平均而言，增加自主权使学业成绩提高了约0.1个标准差，其效果可与资源密集型干预相媲美，但成本极低。然而，反卷积分析揭示了显著的异质性，包括负面和正面效应。基于设计的证据支持理论预测：表现优异的校长受益更多，能有效重新分配资源（例如减少班级规模），而学生群体非典型的学校受益更多，并可能根据当地需求定制服务。这些结果凸显了地方能力、激励一致性和异质性是分权改革成功的关键。
34216.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：H75, H77, I2, J0

34215.title: Job Mismatch and Early Career Success
34215.zh_title: 工作错配与早期职业成功
34215.authors: Julie Berry Cullen, Gordon B. Dahl, Richard De Thorpe
34215.abstract: How does being over- or underqualified at the beginning of a worker's career affect skill acquisition, retention, and promotion? Despite the importance of mismatch for the labor market, self-selection into jobs has made estimating these effects difficult. We overcome endogeneity concerns in the context of the US Air Force, which allocates new enlistees to over 130 different jobs based, in part, on test scores. Using these test scores, we create simulated job assignments based on factors outside of an individual's control: the available slots in upcoming training programs and the quality of other recruits entering at the same time. These factors create quasi-random variation in job assignment and hence how cognitively demanding an individual's job is relative to their own ability. We find that being overqualified for a job causes higher attrition, both during technical training and afterward when individuals are working in their assigned jobs. It also results in more behavioral problems, worse performance evaluations, and lower scores on general knowledge tests about the military taken by all workers. On the other hand, overqualification results in better performance relative to others in the same job: job-specific test scores rise both during technical training and while on the job, and these individuals are more likely to be promoted. Combined, these patterns suggest that overqualified individuals are less motivated, but still outperform others in their same job. Underqualification results in a polar opposite set of findings, suggesting these individuals are motivated to put forth more effort, but still struggle to compete when judged relative to others. Consistent with differential incentives, individuals who are overqualified are in jobs which are less valuable in terms of outside earnings potential, while the reverse is true for those who are underqualified.
34215.zh_abstract: 在工人职业生涯初期，资历过高或不足如何影响技能获取、留任和晋升？尽管错配对劳动力市场很重要，但自我选择进入工作岗位使得估计这些效应变得困难。我们在美国空军的背景下克服了内生性问题，美国空军根据（部分）测试分数将新兵分配到130多个不同的工作岗位。利用这些测试分数，我们基于个人无法控制的因素创建了模拟的工作分配：即将开始的培训项目中的可用名额以及同时进入的其他新兵的质量。这些因素在工作分配中产生了准随机变化，从而决定了个人的工作相对于其自身能力的认知要求程度。我们发现，资历过高会导致更高的流失率，无论是在技术培训期间还是在之后个人在其分配岗位上工作时。它还会导致更多的行为问题、更差的表现评估以及所有工人都参加的有关军队常识测试的更低分数。另一方面，资历过高导致在同一工作中的相对表现更好：在技术培训期间和在职期间，特定工作的测试分数都会提高，并且这些人更有可能获得晋升。综合来看，这些模式表明资历过高的个人积极性较低，但在同一工作中仍然表现优于其他人。资历不足则产生一组截然相反的结果，表明这些个人有动力付出更多努力，但在与他人比较时仍然难以竞争。与差异化的激励措施一致，资历过高的个人所从事的工作在外部收入潜力方面价值较低，而资历不足的个人则相反。

34214.title: Adaptation Through Experience or Description? Evidence from an Experiment on Efficient Coding
34214.zh_title: 通过经验还是描述进行适应？来自高效编码实验的证据
34214.abstract: The principle of efficient coding implies that the perception of monetary payoffs is shaped by the decision maker's prior beliefs. Specifically, payoffs that the decision maker expects to encounter more frequently should be perceived more accurately. Most previous tests of efficient coding rely on the decision maker's experience to shape the prior. We conduct a pre-registered experiment to test whether descriptive information about the prior affects behavior in a manner consistent with efficient coding. We randomize whether participants receive this information before the experiment begins. We find strong evidence for efficient coding; however, we detect no effect of information provision on behavior. Our results are consistent with the hypothesis that experience quickly crowds out any effect of descriptive information on optimal allocation of coding resources.
34214.zh_abstract: 高效编码原则意味着对货币收益的感知受到决策者先验信念的影响。具体来说，决策者预期更频繁遇到的收益应该被更准确地感知。先前大多数对高效编码的检验依赖于决策者的经验来塑造先验。我们进行了一项预先注册的实验，以检验关于先验的描述性信息是否以与高效编码一致的方式影响行为。我们随机分配参与者在实验开始前是否收到这些信息。我们发现了高效编码的有力证据；然而，我们没有检测到信息提供对行为的影响。我们的结果与以下假设一致：经验会迅速挤出描述性信息对编码资源最优分配的任何影响。

34213.title: Public R&D Meets Economic Development: Embrapa and Brazil’s Agricultural Revolution
34213.zh_title: 公共研发与经济发展：Embrapa与巴西的农业革命
34213.authors: Ariel Akerman, Jacob Moscona, Heitor S. Pellegrina, Karthik Sastry
34213.abstract: Can public R&D in developing countries raise productivity? We study how Brazil’s Embrapa—a public research corporation founded in 1973 to develop locally-relevant agricultural technologies—shaped agricultural development. Researcher-level micro-data reveal that Embrapa shifted innovation toward staple crops and Brazil-specific ecology, with no decline in researcher productivity. Exploiting Embrapa’s staggered expansion alongside municipality-level variation in the ecological suitability of Em-brapa’s innovation, we find significant increases in agricultural productivity, concen-trated in targeted staple crops. Our estimates imply that Embrapa raised aggregate agricultural productivity by 110% with a benefit–cost ratio of 17, driven by the appli-cability of Embrapa’s innovation across Brazil.
34213.zh_abstract: 发展中国家的公共研发能否提高生产力？我们研究了巴西的Embrapa——一家成立于1973年、旨在开发本地相关农业技术的公共研究公司——如何塑造了农业发展。研究人员层面的微观数据显示，Embrapa将创新转向了主粮作物和巴西特有的生态，而研究人员生产力并未下降。利用Embrapa的逐步扩张以及市镇层面Embrapa创新生态适宜性的差异，我们发现农业生产率显著提高，且集中在目标主粮作物上。我们的估计表明，Embrapa使农业总生产率提高了110%，效益成本比为17，这得益于Embrapa创新在巴西各地的适用性。
34213.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EFG, PR；JEL：O13, O25, O3, O38, O4, O54

34212.title: International Students, Immigration Policies and Implications for Innovation
34212.zh_title: 国际学生、移民政策及其对创新的影响
34212.abstract: This paper examines the evolving trends and policy dynamics of international student migration, focusing on their implications for STEM workforce development and innovation. While the United States has remained a leading destination for international students, recent years have seen a plateau or decline in incoming students, contrasted by growth in countries like Canada, Australia, and emerging hubs such as China and India. International students, particularly in STEM fields, play a critical role in shaping host countries' innovation ecosystems, often transitioning to permanent residents and STEM workers. We review immigration policies, including post-graduation work and residency pathways, highlighting their varying impacts on student inflows and innovation. Policies in Canada and Australia have until recently eased these transitions, while restrictive measures in the U.S. and U.K. have posed challenges. By documenting these trends and policy shifts, we identify gaps in the literature and outline directions for future research at the intersection of international education, immigration, and innovation.
34212.zh_abstract: 本文考察了国际学生流动的演变趋势和政策动态，重点关注其对STEM劳动力发展和创新的影响。尽管美国一直是国际学生的首选目的地，但近年来入学人数趋于平稳或下降，而加拿大、澳大利亚以及中国和印度等新兴中心则出现增长。国际学生，尤其是STEM领域的学生，在塑造东道国创新生态系统方面发挥着关键作用，他们通常转变为永久居民和STEM工作者。我们回顾了移民政策，包括毕业后工作和居留途径，强调了它们对学生流入和创新的不同影响。加拿大和澳大利亚的政策直到最近才放宽了这些过渡，而美国和英国的限制性措施则带来了挑战。通过记录这些趋势和政策变化，我们识别了文献中的空白，并概述了国际教育、移民和创新交叉领域未来研究的方向。

34211.title: Managerial Incentives, Financial Innovation, and Risk-Management Policies
34211.zh_title: 管理层激励、金融创新与风险管理政策
34211.authors: Son Ku Kim, Seung Joo Lee, Sheridan Titman
34211.abstract: This paper studies the risk choices of a firm run by an effort and risk-averse manager, where the firm’s initial risk exposure is only observed by the manager. By eliminating zero NPV risk, hedging can improve the ability of firms to efficiently induce effort from their manager. We consider conditions under which information asymmetry about risk exposure alters the optimal compensation contract. In some settings, asymmetric information has no effect on the manager’s optimal compensation. However, in other settings, inducing the manager to hedge rather than speculate requires the optimal contract to directly account for hedgeable risk. When inducing the manager to hedge is sufficiently costly, the optimal contract may restrict the use of derivatives.
34211.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一家由努力且风险厌恶的管理者经营的企业所面临的风险选择，其中企业的初始风险敞口仅由管理者观察。通过消除零净现值风险，对冲可以改善企业有效激励管理者努力的能力。我们考虑了关于风险敞口的信息不对称改变最优薪酬合同的条件。在某些情况下，信息不对称对管理者的最优薪酬没有影响。然而，在其他情况下，诱导管理者对冲而非投机需要最优合同直接考虑可对冲风险。当诱导管理者对冲的成本足够高时，最优合同可能会限制衍生品的使用。

34210.title: Expectation Response Functions in Dynamic Linear Economies
34210.zh_title: 动态线性经济中的预期响应函数
34210.abstract: Macroeconomic disturbances affect both current fundamentals and expectations of future fundamentals, but most analyses report only the total of these effects. The expectation response function (ERF) isolates the role of expected future fundamentals in a theory. Defined as the response today to a change in expected fundamentals at each future horizon, the ERF does not depend on the fundamentals' laws of motion, the information held by agents, or the assumption of rational expectations. In applications, we show that (i) the new-Keynesian model implies modest expectational effects of technology and monetary shocks, while (ii) markup shocks in a medium-scale DSGE model have far larger expectational impacts than the “puzzling” effects of forward guidance.
34210.zh_abstract: 宏观经济冲击既影响当前基本面，也影响对未来基本面的预期，但大多数分析只报告这些效应的总和。预期响应函数（ERF）在理论中分离了预期未来基本面的作用。ERF定义为当前对每个未来时期预期基本面变化的响应，它不依赖于基本面的运动规律、代理人拥有的信息或理性预期假设。在应用中，我们表明（i）新凯恩斯模型意味着技术和货币冲击的预期效应适中，而（ii）中等规模DSGE模型中的加成冲击具有比“令人困惑的”前瞻指引效应大得多的预期影响。

34209.title: Does Tax Avoidance Trickle Down? Evidence from a Field Experiment
34209.zh_title: 避税行为会向下蔓延吗？来自实地实验的证据
34209.authors: Justin E. Holz, Ricardo Perez-Truglia, Alejandro Zentner
34209.abstract: The wealthiest individuals frequently engage in tax avoidance, and public awareness of this behavior is growing. Such awareness may undermine tax compliance among the broader population, either by revealing strategies others can emulate or by shifting social norms to make avoidance seem more acceptable. We first document that individuals are less tolerant of both tax avoidance and tax evasion when carried out by the wealthiest households. We next present results from a field experiment on property tax appeals, which—like other forms of tax avoidance—is used disproportionately by the wealthiest households. Providing information about the appeal rates of the richest-1% of households increased individuals’ perceptions of unfairness, but did not affect their own appeal decisions—measured via administrative records—or even their expected tax savings. Information about the prevalence of appeals among comparable households also had no effect. By contrast, information about the expected financial gains from appealing had a significant effect on appeal choices. In sum, while the public condemns tax avoidance by the wealthiest households, we find no sign that such behavior encourages similar actions among the broader population.
34209.zh_abstract: 最富有的个人经常进行避税，公众对此行为的认识正在加深。这种认识可能会削弱更广泛人群的纳税遵从度，要么通过揭示他人可以效仿的策略，要么通过改变社会规范使避税看起来更可接受。我们首先记录到，个人对最富裕家庭进行的避税和逃税行为的容忍度都较低。接下来，我们展示了一项关于房产税申诉实地实验的结果——与其他形式的避税一样，房产税申诉也被最富裕家庭不成比例地使用。提供关于最富有的1%家庭申诉率的信息，增加了个人对不公平感的认知，但并未影响他们自己的申诉决定（通过行政记录衡量），甚至也未影响他们预期的税收节省。关于同类家庭中申诉普遍性的信息也没有产生影响。相比之下，关于申诉预期财务收益的信息对申诉选择产生了显著影响。总之，尽管公众谴责最富裕家庭的避税行为，但我们没有发现任何迹象表明这种行为会鼓励更广泛人群采取类似行动。

34208.title: A Chip Off the Old Block? Genetics and the Intergenerational Transmission of Socioeconomic Status
34208.zh_title: 有其父必有其子？遗传学与社会经济地位的代际传递
34208.authors: Sjoerd van Alten, Silvia H. Barcellos, Leandro Carvalho, Titus J. Galama, Marina Aguiar Palma
34208.abstract: Progress in understanding the role of genetics in intergenerational socioeconomic persistence has been hampered by challenges of measurement and identification. We examine how the genetics of one generation influences the SES of the next by linking genetic data from the Dutch Lifelines Cohort to tax records for 2006-2022. Our genetic measure is the polygenic index (PGI) for educational attainment. To isolate causal genetic effects, we exploit randomness in genetic transmission across generations. One generation’s genetics impacts the education, income, and wealth of the next. A 10-percentile increase in one generation’s PGI raises next generation’s education by 0.11 years. “Next-generation genetic effects” are also large relative to “same-generation genetic effects”: a 10-percentile increase in a person’s PGI raises their income by 0.9 percentiles and their child’s by 0.7 percentiles, indicating strong persistence across generations. We next turn to mechanisms: about half of next-generation genetic effects reflect direct genetic inheritance (“genetic transmission”). The remainder operates through environmental pathways (“genetic nurture”): one generation’s genetics shapes the circumstances in which the next is raised. This environmental channel is reinforced by assortative mating: high-PGI individuals select more-educated, higher-earning partners. Our findings underscore that genetics is one of the forces anchoring SES across generations.
34208.zh_abstract: 在理解遗传学在代际社会经济持续性中的作用方面取得的进展，一直受到测量和识别挑战的阻碍。我们通过将荷兰Lifelines队列的遗传数据与2006-2022年的税收记录相关联，研究了一代人的遗传学如何影响下一代的社会经济地位（SES）。我们的遗传指标是教育程度的多基因指数（PGI）。为了隔离因果遗传效应，我们利用了遗传在代际间传递的随机性。一代人的遗传学影响下一代的教育、收入和财富。一代人的PGI每增加10个百分位，下一代的教育程度提高0.11年。“下一代遗传效应”相对于“同代遗传效应”也很大：一个人的PGI每增加10个百分位，其收入提高0.9个百分位，其子女的收入提高0.7个百分位，这表明存在强烈的代际持续性。接下来我们探讨机制：大约一半的下一代遗传效应反映了直接的遗传继承（“遗传传递”）。其余部分通过环境途径（“遗传培育”）发挥作用：一代人的遗传学塑造了下一代成长的环境。这一环境渠道因选型交配而得到加强：高PGI的个体会选择受教育程度更高、收入更高的伴侣。我们的研究结果强调，遗传学是锚定代际社会经济地位的力量之一。

34207.title: The Algorithm Advantage: Ranked Application Systems Outperform Decentralized and Common Applications in Boston and Beyond
34207.zh_title: 算法优势：排名申请系统在波士顿及其他地区优于分散申请和通用申请
34207.authors: Christopher Avery, Geoffrey Kocks, Parag A. Pathak
34207.abstract: School choice systems increasingly use common applications, where students can apply to multiple schools on a single form, though schools make admission decisions independently. We model three application systems: a common application, a decentralized system with costly separate applications, and a ranked-choice system using a matching algorithm. Our model shows that while a common application may expand access, it increases competition and may produce worse matches than a decentralized system where application costs encourage more selective applications. Ranked-choice systems combine reduced application costs with preference-based matching that reduce mismatches. We examine these predictions by analyzing how Boston's charter school sector was affected when it adopted an online common application. Counterfactual simulations suggest the common application performs no better than alternatives on several metrics and did little to increase access for disadvantaged groups. A ranked system consistently outperforms a common application across various levels of competition and assumptions on preference stability between application and enrollment stages.
34207.zh_abstract: 择校系统越来越多地使用通用申请，即学生可以在单一表格上申请多所学校，但学校独立做出录取决定。我们模拟了三种申请系统：通用申请系统、申请成本高昂的分散系统，以及使用匹配算法的排名选择系统。我们的模型表明，虽然通用申请可能扩大入学机会，但它增加了竞争，并且可能比分散系统产生更差的匹配结果，因为在分散系统中，申请成本鼓励了更具选择性的申请。排名选择系统结合了降低的申请成本和基于偏好的匹配，从而减少了错配。我们通过分析波士顿特许学校部门在采用在线通用申请时受到的影响来检验这些预测。反事实模拟表明，通用申请在多项指标上的表现并不优于替代方案，并且在增加弱势群体入学机会方面作用甚微。在各种竞争水平以及申请与录取阶段之间偏好稳定性的不同假设下，排名系统始终优于通用申请系统。

34206.title: Tariffs, Trade Wars, and the Natural Rate of Interest
34206.zh_title: 关税、贸易战与自然利率
34206.abstract: What are the effects of tariff changes and trade conflicts on the natural rate of interest? This article investigates this question, using a multicountry, heterogeneous-agent trade model in which the natural rate of interest is determined by firms’ demand for capital and households’ supply of assets through their savings behavior. We analyze how the equilibrium interest rate evolves during the transition to higher unilateral tariffs and a global trade war. In the short run, tariffs reduce capital demand, and so the natural rate of interest must fall for households’ asset supply to line up with capital demand. In the long run, both asset supply and capital demand fall by similar amounts, which leads to little change in the long-run natural rate of interest.
34206.zh_abstract: 关税变化和贸易冲突对自然利率有何影响？本文利用一个多国、异质性代理人贸易模型来研究这个问题，在该模型中，自然利率由企业的资本需求和家庭通过储蓄行为提供的资产供给共同决定。我们分析了在向更高单边关税和全球贸易战过渡期间，均衡利率如何演变。短期内，关税减少了资本需求，因此自然利率必须下降，以使家庭的资产供给与资本需求保持一致。长期内，资产供给和资本需求均以相似幅度下降，这导致长期自然利率变化不大。
34206.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：E0, E40, F0, F10, F40

34205.title: Adapting for scale: Experimental Evidence on Technology-aided Instruction in India
34205.zh_title: 为规模化而适应：印度技术辅助教学的实验证据
34205.abstract: Many interventions that “work” in small-scale trials often fail when scaled. This highlights the need to adapt promising interventions for scalability by addressing constraints that bind at larger scales. We do so in the context of a personalized adaptive learning (PAL) software that was highly effective in a small-scale trial. We adapt the PAL implementation for scalability by integrating it into public school schedules, and experimentally evaluate this adaptation in a more representative sample over 20 times larger than the original study. After 18 months, treated students scored 0.22σ higher in Mathematics and 0.20σ higher in Hindi, a 50–66% productivity increase over the control group. Learning gains were proportional to student time on the platform, providing a simple, low-cost metric for monitoring implementation quality in future scale-ups. The adaptation and its experimental validation have informed scale-ups now reaching over 250,000 students.
34205.zh_abstract: 许多在小规模试验中“有效”的干预措施在推广时往往失败。这凸显了通过解决大规模实施时的约束条件，来调整有前景的干预措施以适应规模化需求的必要性。我们在一款在小规模试验中非常有效的个性化自适应学习（PAL）软件背景下进行此项工作。我们通过将PAL实施整合到公立学校的课程表中来调整其可扩展性，并在一个比原始研究大20倍以上的更具代表性的样本中，通过实验评估了这一调整。18个月后，接受处理的学生数学成绩提高了0.22个标准差，印地语成绩提高了0.20个标准差，相对于对照组，生产力提高了50-66%。学习收益与学生在平台上的时间成正比，这为未来扩大规模时监测实施质量提供了一个简单、低成本的指标。该调整及其实验验证已为目前覆盖超过25万名学生的规模化推广提供了依据。
34205.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, LS, PE, PR；JEL：C93, I21, O15

34204.title: Place-Based Variation in Health Care: Evidence from Mandatory Movers in the U.S. Military Health System
34204.zh_title: 基于地点的医疗保健差异：来自美国军事医疗系统强制迁移者的证据
34204.authors: William P. Luan, Roxana Leal, John S. Zhou, Jonathan S. Skinner
34204.abstract: There is increasing evidence on regional variations in U.S. Medicare utilization based on older patients who move. Yet evidence is limited for younger ages in the U.S., and movers may differ systematically from those who don’t move. In this paper, we harness the mandatory migration of military personnel and dependents (age 5 to 64) to estimate supply and demand factors in a system of care in which military physicians are salaried and copayments and deductibles are negligible. In our sample of 3 million enrollees, we find that place or supply effects explain as much as 80 percent of the overall regional variation for both the entire sample and for active-duty personnel. These regional place effects are correlated across age groups, with correlations as high as 0.84 between middle-aged and older military enrollees. These regional supply-side variations cannot be explained by differences in health, financial incentives, or quality of care, but appear consistent with location-specific differences in physician beliefs.
34204.zh_abstract: 越来越多的证据表明，基于迁移的老年患者，美国医疗保险（Medicare）的使用存在地区差异。然而，针对美国较年轻年龄段的证据有限，并且迁移者可能与不迁移者存在系统性差异。在本文中，我们利用军人及其家属（年龄5至64岁）的强制迁移，来估计一个由军医领取薪金且共付额和免赔额可忽略不计的医疗系统中的供给和需求因素。在我们的300万参保者样本中，我们发现，对于整个样本和现役军人而言，地点或供给效应可以解释高达80%的总体地区差异。这些地区地点效应在不同年龄组之间存在相关性，中年和老年军人参保者之间的相关性高达0.84。这些地区供给侧的差异无法用健康状况、财务激励或护理质量的差异来解释，但似乎与特定地点的医生信念差异一致。

34203.title: Firm Ownership and Pollution
34203.authors: Tsz Chun Kwok, Daniel Spiro, Arthur A. van Benthem
34203.abstract: We provide a theoretical micro foundation for how much pollution (negative externalities) a firm will internalize based on the ownership distribution of its shareholders. Small shareholders, compared to large ones, want the firm to spend more on avoiding pollution since they suffer less profit loss for the same environmental benefit. In particular, if a shareholder holds a share of 1/N, where N is the population in society, that shareholder's preferences align with a social planner's. Three theoretical predictions arise. First, small shareholders will systematically vote for a greener corporate profile. Second, firms with a smaller weighted median shareholder will pollute less. Third, countries with concentrated corporate wealth holdings and/or more individualized firm ownership pollute more. This implies that standard models of externalities in environmental economics and macroeconomics containing representative agents are either internally inconsistent or not fully specified.
34203.zh_abstract: 我们提供了一个理论微观基础，用以说明企业将根据其股东的持股分布来内化多少污染（负外部性）。与大型股东相比，小股东希望企业在避免污染上投入更多，因为他们在获得相同环境效益的情况下，遭受的利润损失更少。特别是，如果股东持有1/N的股份，其中N是社会总人口，那么该股东的偏好与社会规划者的偏好一致。由此产生三个理论预测。首先，小股东将系统性地投票支持更环保的企业形象。其次，加权中位数股东持股比例较小的企业污染更少。第三，企业财富持有集中和/或企业所有权更个人化的国家污染更多。这意味着环境经济学和宏观经济学中包含代表性代理人的标准外部性模型要么内部不一致，要么未被完全指定。

34202.title: AI Agents for Economic Research
34202.zh_title: 用于经济学研究的AI智能体
34202.abstract: The objective of this paper is to demystify AI agents - autonomous LLM-based systems that plan, use tools, and execute multi-step research tasks - and to provide hands-on instructions for economists to build their own, even if they do not have programming expertise. As AI has evolved from simple chatbots to reasoning models and now to autonomous agents, the main focus of this paper is to make these powerful tools accessible to all researchers. Through working examples and step-by-step code, it shows how economists can create agents that autonomously conduct literature reviews across myriads of sources, write and debug econometric code, fetch and analyze economic data, and coordinate complex research workflows. The paper demonstrates that by "vibe coding" (programming through natural language) and building on modern agentic frameworks like LangGraph, any economist can build sophisticated research assistants and other autonomous tools in minutes. By providing complete, working implementations alongside conceptual frameworks, this guide demonstrates how to employ AI agents in every stage of the research process, from initial investigation to final analysis.
34202.zh_abstract: 本文的目标是揭开AI智能体——即基于LLM的自主系统，能够规划、使用工具并执行多步骤研究任务——的神秘面纱，并为经济学家提供构建自己智能体的实践指导，即使他们没有编程专业知识。随着AI从简单的聊天机器人发展到推理模型，再到现在的自主智能体，本文的主要焦点是让所有研究人员都能使用这些强大的工具。通过工作示例和逐步代码，本文展示了经济学家如何创建能够自主地在海量资源中进行文献综述、编写和调试计量经济学代码、获取和分析经济数据，以及协调复杂研究工作流程的智能体。本文证明，通过“氛围编码”（通过自然语言编程）并基于像LangGraph这样的现代智能体框架，任何经济学家都可以在几分钟内构建出复杂的研究助手和其他自主工具。通过提供完整、可工作的实现以及概念框架，本指南展示了如何在研究过程的每个阶段（从初步调查到最终分析）使用AI智能体。
34202.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PR, TWP；JEL：A11, B41, C63

34201.title: A Discrete Choice Analysis of Consumer Decisions: Nicotine Products in an Illicit Market
34201.zh_title: 消费者决策的离散选择分析：非法市场中的尼古丁产品
34201.authors: Asena Caner, Belgi Turan, Berna Tari Kasnakoğlu, Yenal Can Yiğit, Donald S. Kenkel, Alan D. Mathios
34201.abstract: This study investigates consumer stated preferences for manufactured cigarettes, roll-your-own tobacco, and vapes in Türkiye, with a focus on how product attributes shape choices of adult consumers. A discrete choice experiment embedded in an online survey examines the role of prices of these products, flavor availability, and most importantly the legal status of vapes. Results indicate strong price sensitivity, both to own prices and to the prices of substitutes. In addition, legal status emerges as a critical factor that shapes stated preferences: consumers exhibit a marked aversion to products that are banned or sold illegally. However, scenario analyses suggest that vapes would capture a substantial market share even under strict prohibition. The hypothetical scenario of a complete ban would likely have a modest effect on the cessation of nicotine products while shifting choices toward traditional combustible tobacco products. These findings highlight the limits of prohibition and underscore the importance of regulatory design. In particular, the treatment of legal status, together with pricing and taxation policies, plays a decisive role in shaping consumer behavior and public health outcomes.
34201.zh_abstract: 本研究调查了土耳其消费者对机制卷烟、自卷烟和电子烟的陈述偏好，重点关注产品属性如何影响成年消费者的选择。一项嵌入在线调查的离散选择实验考察了这些产品的价格、口味可得性以及最重要的电子烟法律地位的作用。结果显示，消费者对自身价格和替代品价格均表现出强烈的价格敏感性。此外，法律地位成为塑造陈述偏好的关键因素：消费者对禁止或非法销售的产品表现出明显的厌恶。然而，情景分析表明，即使在严格禁止的情况下，电子烟仍将占据相当大的市场份额。全面禁止的假设情景可能对尼古丁产品的戒断产生适度影响，同时会将选择转向传统的可燃烟草产品。这些发现凸显了禁令的局限性，并强调了监管设计的重要性。特别是，法律地位的处理以及定价和税收政策，在塑造消费者行为和公共卫生结果方面发挥着决定性作用。

34200.title: Beyond the Taylor Rule
34200.authors: Emi Nakamura, Venance Riblier, Jón Steinsson
34200.abstract: The Federal Reserve partially "looked through" the post-Covid rise in inflation and ultimately managed to bring about an "immaculate disinflation." The Fed's policy deviated strongly from the Taylor rule during this period. More generally, central banks with strong inflation-fighting credentials looked through post-Covid inflationary shocks yet experienced less inflation than more hawkish but less credible central banks. In light of this episode, we assess the degree to which the Taylor rule is descriptive, and the degree to which it should be viewed as prescriptive. While the Taylor rule (generally) fits well during the Greenspan period, it (generally) fits poorly in the early 1980s and after the early 2000s. Academic work has emphasized the role of the Taylor rule in preventing self-fulfilling fluctuations (guaranteeing determinacy). These concerns can be addressed with a shock-contingent commitment and are fragile to deviations from fully rational expectations. We discuss three reasons why optimal policy may not always imply a one-for-one response of interest rates to inflation (forward guidance, correlated shocks, and "long and variable lags"). The main challenge arising from such policies is not indeterminacy but erosion of inflation-fighting credibility and potential deanchoring of long-run inflation expectations. Only central banks with strongly anchored inflation expectations and large amounts of inflation-fighting credibility are likely to be able to look through inflationary shocks.
34200.zh_abstract: 美联储部分“看穿”了疫情后通胀的上升，并最终实现了“完美的反通胀”。在此期间，美联储的政策严重偏离了泰勒规则。更广泛地说，那些具有强大抗通胀信誉的央行看穿了疫情后的通胀冲击，但经历的通胀却低于那些更鹰派但信誉较低的央行。基于这一事件，我们评估了泰勒规则在多大程度上具有描述性，以及在多大程度上应被视为规范性。虽然泰勒规则在格林斯潘时期（总体上）拟合良好，但在20世纪80年代初和21世纪初之后（总体上）拟合不佳。学术研究强调了泰勒规则在防止自我实现的波动（确保确定性）方面的作用。这些问题可以通过冲击依赖的承诺来解决，并且在对完全理性预期的偏离面前是脆弱的。我们讨论了最优政策可能并不总是意味着利率对通胀做出一对一反应的三个原因（前瞻性指引、相关冲击和“长期且多变的滞后”）。此类政策带来的主要挑战不是不确定性，而是抗通胀信誉的侵蚀以及长期通胀预期可能失去锚定。只有那些通胀预期锚定牢固且拥有大量抗通胀信誉的央行，才可能有能力看穿通胀冲击。

34255.title: How People Use ChatGPT
34255.authors: Aaron Chatterji, Thomas Cunningham, David J. Deming, Zoe Hitzig, Christopher Ong, Carl Yan Shan, Kevin Wadman
34255.abstract: Despite the rapid adoption of LLM chatbots, little is known about how they are used. We document the growth of ChatGPT’s consumer product from its launch in November 2022 through July 2025, when it had been adopted by around 10% of the world’s adult population. Early adopters were disproportionately male but the gender gap has narrowed dramatically, and we find higher growth rates in lower-income countries. Using a privacy-preserving automated pipeline, we classify usage patterns within a representative sample of ChatGPT conversations. We find steady growth in work-related messages but even faster growth in non-work-related messages, which have grown from 53% to more than 70% of all usage. Work usage is more common for educated users in highly-paid professional occupations. We classify messages by conversation topic and find that “Practical Guidance,” “Seeking Information,” and “Writing” are the three most common topics and collectively account for nearly 80% of all conversations. Writing dominates work-related tasks, highlighting chatbots’ unique ability to generate digital outputs compared to traditional search engines. Computer programming and self-expression both represent relatively small shares of use. Overall, we find that ChatGPT provides economic value through decision support, which is especially important in knowledge-intensive jobs.
34255.zh_abstract: 尽管大型语言模型聊天机器人被迅速采用，但关于它们如何被使用却知之甚少。我们记录了ChatGPT消费产品从2022年11月推出到2025年7月的增长情况，此时它已被全球约10%的成年人口采用。早期采用者中男性比例过高，但性别差距已大幅缩小，并且我们在低收入国家发现了更高的增长率。利用一个保护隐私的自动化流程，我们在ChatGPT对话的代表性样本中对使用模式进行分类。我们发现与工作相关的消息稳步增长，但与工作无关的消息增长更快，后者已从占总使用量的53%增长到超过70%。工作用途在受过教育的高薪专业职业用户中更为常见。我们按对话主题对消息进行分类，发现“实用指导”、“寻求信息”和“写作”是最常见的三个主题，合计占所有对话的近80%。写作主导了与工作相关的任务，突显了聊天机器人相比传统搜索引擎生成数字输出的独特能力。计算机编程和自我表达的使用占比都相对较小。总体而言，我们发现ChatGPT通过决策支持提供经济价值，这在知识密集型工作中尤为重要。

34254.title: Time for Mental Healthcare: Evidence from Paid Sick Leave Mandates
34254.zh_title: 心理健康护理的时间：来自带薪病假强制令的证据
34254.authors: Matthew Eisenberg, Yimin Ge, Ezra Golberstein, Johanna Catherine Maclean
34254.abstract: We study the effects of state paid sick leave (PSL) mandates on mental healthcare use. To do so, we use all-payer health insurance claims data from IQVIA 2015-2022 combined with difference-in-differences methods. Findings suggest that overall mental healthcare use does not change post-PSL mandate. The null finding overall masks clinically relevant changes along the intensive margin: patients substitute away from lower levels of care to higher levels of care as time constraints are relaxed. Further, analysis of survey data hints that this change in treatment use improves mental health. Keywords: Paid sick leave; social insurance; social insurance.
34254.zh_abstract: 我们研究了州级带薪病假（PSL）强制令对心理健康护理使用的影响。为此，我们使用了IQVIA 2015-2022年的全付款人健康保险索赔数据，并结合双重差分方法。研究结果表明，在PSL强制令实施后，总体心理健康护理使用没有变化。总体上的零结果掩盖了在集约边际上临床相关的变化：随着时间约束的放松，患者从较低级别的护理转向较高级别的护理。此外，对调查数据的分析暗示，这种治疗使用的变化改善了心理健康。关键词：带薪病假；社会保险；社会保险。

34253.title: Insuring Labor Income Shocks: The Role of the Dynasty
34253.zh_title: 保障劳动收入冲击：家族的作用
34253.authors: Andreas Fagereng, Luigi Guiso, Luigi Pistaferri, Marius A. K. Ring
34253.abstract: We provide empirical evidence on the importance of a relatively understudied channel of insurance against labor income shocks: transfers from (cash-rich) parents to (cash-short) children when the latter experience negative wage shocks. Matching population data for Norway across two generations, we establish several results. First, parents make a transfer—i.e., run down liquid assets—when adult children experience negative labor income shocks. Consistent with dynastic insurance, we observe no transfers when income shocks are positive. Second, parents' responses depend on the nature of the shock. If losses are temporary, parents dissave; if they are persistent, parents save in order to make future transfers. Parental transfers offset 43% of temporary and 27% of persistent losses. Third, insurance is lower when children have other smoothing options, like spousal labor supply, and is greater for shocks to their own child versus a child’s spouse. Support also increases if the spouse’s parents can contribute, suggesting “competition for attention.” Lastly, insurance flows are one-way: children do not insure their parents against income losses.
34253.zh_abstract: 我们提供了关于一个相对未被充分研究的劳动收入冲击保险渠道重要性的实证证据：当子女经历负面工资冲击时，来自（现金充裕的）父母向（现金短缺的）子女的转移支付。通过匹配挪威两代人的总体数据，我们建立了几个结果。首先，当成年子女经历负面劳动收入冲击时，父母会进行转移支付——即减少流动资产。与家族保险一致，当收入冲击为正时，我们没有观察到转移支付。其次，父母的反应取决于冲击的性质。如果损失是暂时的，父母会动用储蓄；如果是持久的，父母会储蓄以便未来进行转移支付。父母的转移支付抵消了43%的暂时性损失和27%的持久性损失。第三，当子女有其他平滑选择（如配偶劳动供给）时，保险程度较低；并且对于子女自身而非子女配偶的冲击，保险程度更高。如果配偶的父母也能提供帮助，支持也会增加，这表明存在“注意力竞争”。最后，保险流动是单向的：子女不会为父母的收入损失提供保险。

34252.title: Business Owners and the Self-Employed: Thirty-Three Million (and Counting!)
34252.zh_title: 企业主与自雇者：三千三百万（且还在增加！）
34252.authors: Christopher Goetz, Henry R. Hyatt, Zachary Kroff, Kristin Sandusky, Martha Stinson
34252.abstract: Entrepreneurs are known to be key drivers of economic growth, and the rise of online platforms and the broader "gig economy" has led self-employment to surge in recent decades. Yet the young and small businesses associated with this activity are often absent from economic data. In this paper, we explore a novel longitudinal dataset that covers the owners of tens of millions of the smallest businesses: those without employees. We produce three new sets of statistics on the rapidly growing set of nonemployer businesses. First, we measure transitions between self-employment and wage and salary jobs. Second, we describe nonemployer business entry and exit, as well as transitions between legal form (e.g., sole proprietorship to S corporation). Finally, we link owners to their nonemployer businesses and examine the dynamics of business ownership.
34252.zh_abstract: 企业家被认为是经济增长的关键驱动力，而在线平台和更广泛的“零工经济”的兴起使得近几十年来自雇人数激增。然而，与此活动相关的年轻和小型企业往往在经济数据中缺失。在本文中，我们探索了一个新颖的纵向数据集，该数据集涵盖了数千万最小型企业（即没有雇员的企业）的所有者。我们针对快速增长的无雇员企业群体，生成了三组新的统计数据。首先，我们衡量了自雇与受薪工作之间的转换。其次，我们描述了无雇员企业的进入和退出，以及法律形式之间的转换（例如，从独资企业到S型公司）。最后，我们将所有者与其无雇员企业联系起来，并考察了企业所有权的动态变化。

34251.title: Human Capital and Racial Inequality in the US Labor Market
34251.zh_title: 美国劳动力市场中的人力资本与种族不平等
34251.abstract: If racial gaps in measures of human capital like educational attainment and standardized test scores were eliminated, what would happen to racial disparities in wages, employment, and other labor market outcomes? A credible answer to this question is foundational for understanding the nature and scope of racial inequality and discrimination in the United States. This article reviews and synthesizes a literature that studies this question by estimating the extent to which controlling for measures of human capital changes Black-white gaps in labor market outcomes, and discusses various conceptual and methodological issues related to interpreting this type of exercise. I show that while accurately interpreting this exercise and its many variants requires careful thinking, the results elucidate many important and subtle aspects of racial inequality in the United States.
34251.zh_abstract: 如果人力资本衡量指标（如教育程度和标准化考试成绩）中的种族差距被消除，那么工资、就业和其他劳动力市场结果中的种族差异会发生什么变化？对这个问题的可信回答，对于理解美国种族不平等和歧视的性质与范围至关重要。本文回顾并综合了相关文献，这些文献通过估计控制人力资本衡量指标在多大程度上改变了黑人与白人在劳动力市场结果上的差距来研究这一问题，并讨论了与解释此类分析相关的各种概念和方法论问题。我表明，虽然准确解释这一分析及其众多变体需要仔细思考，但结果阐明了美国种族不平等的许多重要而微妙的方面。
34251.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I26, I30, J0, J01, J20, J70, J78

34250.title: Deep Learning for Solving Economic Models
34250.zh_title: 用于求解经济模型的深度学习
34250.abstract: The ongoing revolution in deep learning is reshaping research across many fields, including economics. Its effects are especially clear in solving dynamic economic models. These models often lack closed-form solutions, so economists have long relied on numerical methods such as value function iteration, perturbation, and projection techniques. Unfortunately, these approaches suffer from the curse of dimensionality, which makes global solutions computationally infeasible as the number of state variables increases. Deep learning offers a different approach: flexible tools that solve dynamic economic models by minimizing residuals in equilibrium conditions, and that can handle high-dimensional problems. This development promises to broaden the scope of quantitative economics. I illustrate the approach using the neoclassical growth model.
34250.zh_abstract: 正在进行的深度学习革命正在重塑包括经济学在内的许多领域的研究。其影响在求解动态经济模型方面尤为明显。这些模型通常缺乏闭式解，因此经济学家长期以来依赖数值方法，如值函数迭代、摄动法和投影技术。不幸的是，这些方法受到维度诅咒的困扰，随着状态变量数量的增加，全局解在计算上变得不可行。深度学习提供了一种不同的方法：通过最小化均衡条件中的残差来求解动态经济模型的灵活工具，并且能够处理高维问题。这一发展有望拓宽定量经济学的范围。我使用新古典增长模型来说明这种方法。

34249.title: More to Live for: Health Investment Responses to Expected Retirement Wealth in Chile
34249.zh_title: 更多生存动力：智利预期退休财富对健康投资的影响
34249.authors: Grant Miller, Nieves Valdés, Marcos Vera-Hernández
34249.abstract: An important but poorly understood way that economic development may influence health is through the private incentives that it creates for individuals to invest in their own health. In this paper, we study how individuals' forward-looking health investments respond to changes in expected future (but not current) wealth. Focusing on institutional features of Chile's public pension overhaul in 1981, we link administrative microdata to a detailed household panel survey, and we then exploit discrete breaks in the resulting cohort pension wealth profile using a fuzzy regression kink design (RKD). Although theoretically ambiguous, empirically we find that greater expected pension wealth increases the use of important preventive medical care (and to a lesser extent, promotes more costly healthy lifestyle behaviors) – leading to measurable increases in chronic disease diagnosis (a requisite for appropriate disease management), reductions in disease prevalence, and measurably lower mortality in old age (particularly due to chronic diseases). In general, these results provide new evidence that economic development can have a meaningful incentive effect on health.
34249.zh_abstract: 经济发展可能通过为个人创造投资自身健康的私人激励来影响健康，这是一个重要但尚未被充分理解的途径。本文研究了个人的前瞻性健康投资如何响应预期未来（而非当前）财富的变化。我们聚焦于智利1981年公共养老金改革的制度特征，将行政微观数据与详细的家户面板调查相链接，并利用模糊回归断点设计（RKD）来利用由此产生的队列养老金财富曲线中的离散断点。尽管理论上存在不确定性，但实证发现，更高的预期养老金财富增加了重要预防性医疗服务的利用（并在较小程度上促进了更昂贵的健康生活方式行为），从而导致了慢性病诊断（这是适当疾病管理的必要条件）的可测量增加、疾病患病率的降低，以及老年期（尤其是因慢性病导致的）死亡率的显著下降。总体而言，这些结果提供了新的证据，表明经济发展可以对健康产生有意义的激励效应。
34249.meta: Programs：AG, DEV, EH；JEL：H55, I12, I15, I18, J18

34248.title: Substituting Talent with Transactions: Acquisitions as Responses to Immigration Restrictions
34248.zh_title: 用交易替代人才：企业并购作为对移民限制的回应
34248.authors: Jens Friedmann, Britta Glennon, Exequiel Hernandez
34248.abstract: We examine how firms respond to talent scarcity caused by restrictive immigration policies. We argue that when firms cannot build capabilities internally through hiring, they alter their boundaries by engaging in corporate acquisitions to make up for the foregone talent and capabilities. Using data on 3,861 U.S. firms and their use of the H-1B visa program (2001-2020), we leverage two exogenous shocks—the 2004 H-1B cap reduction and the 2007-2008 visa lottery—and find causal evidence that firms make more acquisitions as their exposure to immigration restrictions rises. This effect is stronger for deals with purposes related to the skills of the foregone talent, for small acquisitions, for domestic targets, and for targets in places with higher concentrations of skilled workers.
34248.zh_abstract: 我们研究了企业如何应对由限制性移民政策造成的人才稀缺。我们认为，当企业无法通过招聘在内部构建能力时，它们会通过进行企业并购来改变自身边界，以弥补失去的人才和能力。利用2001年至2020年间3861家美国企业及其使用H-1B签证计划的数据，我们借助两个外生冲击——2004年H-1B签证配额减少和2007-2008年签证抽签——并发现因果证据表明，随着企业面临的移民限制增加，它们会进行更多的并购。这种效应在与失去人才技能相关的并购目的、小型并购、国内目标企业以及位于高技能工人集中地区的目标企业中更为显著。
34248.meta: Programs：LS, PR；JEL：F22, G34, J24, J61, L2

34247.title: Utilitarian or Quantile-Welfare Evaluation of Health Policy?
34247.zh_title: 健康政策的效用主义评估还是分位数福利评估？
34247.abstract: This paper considers quantile-welfare evaluation of health policy as an alternative to utilitarian evaluation. Manski (1988) originally proposed and studied maximization of quantile utility as a model of individual decision making under uncertainty, juxtaposing it with maximization of expected utility. That paper's primary motivation was to exploit the fact that maximization of quantile utility requires only an ordinal formalization of utility, not a cardinal one. This paper transfers these ideas from analysis of individual decision making to analysis of social planning. We begin by summarizing basic theoretical properties of quantile welfare in general terms rather than related specifically to health policy. We then propose a procedure to nonparametrically bound the quantile welfare of health states using data from binary-choice time-tradeoff (TTO) experiments of the type regularly performed by health economists. After this we assess related econometric considerations concerning measurement, using the EQ-5D framework to structure our discussion.
34247.zh_abstract: 本文考虑将健康政策的分位数福利评估作为效用主义评估的替代方案。Manski（1988）最初提出并研究了分位数效用最大化作为不确定性下个体决策的模型，并将其与期望效用最大化并列。该论文的主要动机是利用分位数效用最大化仅需要效用的序数形式化而非基数形式化这一事实。本文将这些思想从个体决策分析转移到社会规划分析。我们首先以一般性术语而非专门针对健康政策来总结分位数福利的基本理论性质。然后，我们提出了一种程序，利用健康经济学家定期进行的二元选择时间权衡（TTO）实验数据，对健康状态的分位数福利进行非参数边界估计。在此之后，我们评估了关于测量的相关计量经济学考量，并使用EQ-5D框架来构建我们的讨论。

34246.title: Segregation, Spillovers, and the Locus of Racial Change
34246.zh_title: 隔离、溢出效应与种族变迁的轨迹
34246.authors: Donald R. Davis, Matthew Easton, Stephan Thies
34246.abstract: We use a discrete choice framework to provide the first nesting of Thomas C. Schelling’s canonical models of racial segregation amenable to empirical examination. Using U.S. Census data from 1970–2000, we demonstrate a central role for spatial racial spillovers in shaping racial clustering, patterns of racial shares and housing prices at the boundary of racial clusters, and the locus of racial change. Our results on the locus of racial change conflict strongly with prominent prior results on racial tipping. Our theory provides a foundation for spatially stratified regressions. The strongest spatial effects in the prior work are not tipping, but the distinct biased White suburbanization. Tipping effects in urban areas remote from Minority clusters are small or insignificant. In urban areas proximate to Minority clusters they average less than half those reported in prior pooled results. Policies promoting racial integration must thus attend to the heterogeneous fragility of neighborhoods.
34246.zh_abstract: 我们使用离散选择框架，首次对Thomas C. Schelling关于种族隔离的经典模型进行了嵌套，使其适用于实证检验。利用1970年至2000年的美国人口普查数据，我们证明了空间种族溢出效应在塑造种族聚集、种族集群边界处的种族份额和房价模式以及种族变迁轨迹方面发挥着核心作用。我们关于种族变迁轨迹的结果与先前关于种族临界点的著名结果存在强烈冲突。我们的理论为空间分层回归提供了基础。先前研究中最大的空间效应并非临界点，而是独特的偏向性白人郊区化。在远离少数族裔集群的城市地区，临界点效应很小或不显著。在靠近少数族裔集群的城市地区，其平均值不到先前汇总结果报告的一半。因此，促进种族融合的政策必须关注社区异质性的脆弱性。

34245.title: Abortion, Economic Hardship, and Crime
34245.authors: Erkmen G. Aslim, Wei Fu, Caitlin K. Myers, Erdal Tekin, Bingjin Xue
34245.abstract: We study how abortion access affects economic hardship and crime. Using a database of abortion provider locations and operations in Texas from 2009–2019, we exploit variation in travel distance to the nearest facility created by clinic closures following the enforcement of Texas HB-2 in 2013. We confirm previous evidence that increased distance to the nearest abortion facility reduces abortions and increases births. We provide novel evidence that reduced access to abortion also leads to significant economic hardship, reflected in lower labor force participation, rising debt, widening income inequality, and heightened housing insecurity. This financial strain translates into higher rates of financially motivated crime, such as theft and burglary, with no significant effect on violent crime. These effects extend beyond directly affected individuals, reflecting intrahousehold spillovers. These findings suggest far-reaching consequences of restricted access to reproductive healthcare.
34245.zh_abstract: 我们研究了堕胎可及性如何影响经济困难和犯罪。利用2009年至2019年德克萨斯州堕胎服务提供者位置和运营的数据库，我们利用了2013年德克萨斯州HB-2法案实施后诊所关闭所导致的到最近设施旅行距离的变化。我们证实了先前的证据，即到最近堕胎设施的距离增加会减少堕胎并增加生育。我们提供了新的证据，表明堕胎可及性降低还会导致显著的经济困难，表现为劳动力参与率下降、债务上升、收入不平等加剧以及住房不安全加剧。这种财务压力转化为更高比例的财务动机犯罪，如盗窃和入室盗窃，而对暴力犯罪没有显著影响。这些影响超出了直接受影响的个体，反映了家庭内部的溢出效应。这些发现表明，限制生殖健康服务可及性会产生深远的后果。

34244.title: Exposure to Science and Scientific Careers: Evidence from Minimum Wage Increases and University Lab Employment
34244.zh_title: 科学接触与科学职业：来自最低工资上涨和大学实验室就业的证据
34244.abstract: We study how exposure to scientific research in university laboratories influences students’ pursuit of careers in science. Using administrative data from thousands of research labs linked to student career outcomes and a difference-in-differences design, we show that state minimum wage increases reduce employment of undergraduate research assistants in labs by 7.4%. Undergraduates exposed to these minimum wage increases graduate with 18.1% fewer quarters of lab experience. Using minimum wage changes as an instrumental variable, we estimate that one fewer quarter working in a lab, particularly early in college, reduces the probability of working in the life sciences industry by 2 percentage points and of pursuing doctoral education by 7 percentage points. These effects are attenuated for students supported by the Federal Work-Study program. Our findings highlight how labor market policies can shape the career paths of future scientists and the importance of budget flexibility for principal investigators providing undergraduates with research experience.
34244.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在大学实验室接触科学研究如何影响学生追求科学职业。利用来自数千个研究实验室的行政数据（与学生职业结果相关联）以及双重差分设计，我们表明，州最低工资上涨使实验室中本科生研究助理的就业减少了7.4%。受这些最低工资上涨影响的本科生毕业时的实验室工作经验季度数减少了18.1%。使用最低工资变化作为工具变量，我们估计，在实验室工作每减少一个季度（尤其是在大学早期），在生命科学行业工作的概率降低2个百分点，攻读博士学位的概率降低7个百分点。对于获得联邦工读计划支持的学生，这些影响有所减弱。我们的发现突显了劳动力市场政策如何塑造未来科学家的职业道路，以及为本科生提供研究经验的首席研究员预算灵活性的重要性。

34243.title: Do Markets Believe in Transformative AI?
34243.zh_title: 市场相信变革性人工智能吗？
34243.abstract: Economic theory predicts that transformative technologies may influence interest rates by changing growth expectations, increasing uncertainty about growth, or raising concerns about existential risk. Examining US bond yields around major AI model releases in 2023-4, we find economically large and statistically significant movements concentrated at longer maturities. The median and mean yield responses across releases in our sample are negative: long-term Treasury, TIPS, and corporate yields fall and remain lower for weeks. Viewed through the lens of a simple, representative agent consumption-based asset pricing model, these declines correspond to downward revisions in expected consumption growth and/or a reduction in the perceived probability of extreme outcomes such as existential risk or arrival of a post-scarcity economy. By contrast, changes in consumption growth uncertainty do not appear to drive our results
34243.zh_abstract: 经济理论预测，变革性技术可能通过改变增长预期、增加增长的不确定性或引发对存在风险的担忧来影响利率。通过考察2023-2024年主要人工智能模型发布前后美国债券收益率的变化，我们发现，在长期限债券上存在经济上显著且统计上显著的波动。在我们的样本中，各次发布对应的收益率中位数和均值响应为负：长期国债、通胀保值国债和公司债收益率下降，并在数周内保持较低水平。通过一个简单的、代表性消费者基于消费的资产定价模型来看，这些下降对应于预期消费增长率的向下修正和/或对极端结果（如存在风险或后稀缺经济到来）感知概率的降低。相比之下，消费增长不确定性的变化似乎并非我们结果的主要驱动因素。
34243.meta: Programs：AP, EFG；JEL：E43, E44, G1, G12, G14, O30, O4

34242.title: Inward and Outward Migration under Shifting Legal-Democratic Regimes
34242.zh_title: 法律-民主体制变迁下的向内与向外移民
34242.abstract: This paper analyzes the two-way relationship between international migration and political regime change, highlighting a feedback loop in which political shifts shape migration flows, while migration itself reshapes political trajectories. Relying on a Difference-in-Differences (DiD) framework and a dataset combining migration flows, regime quality indicators (CHRI), and measures of international integration, we identify three central results.
34242.zh_abstract: 本文分析了国际移民与政治体制变迁之间的双向关系，突出了一个反馈循环：政治转变塑造移民流动，而移民本身又重塑政治轨迹。基于双重差分（DiD）框架以及一个结合了移民流动、体制质量指标（CHRI）和国际一体化衡量指标的数据集，我们确定了三个核心结果。

34241.title: The Theory of Financial Stability Meets Reality: A Unifying Framework for Bank Regulation and Accounting Discretion
34241.zh_title: 金融稳定性理论遇见现实：银行监管与会计自由裁量权的统一框架
34241.authors: Nina Boyarchenko, Kinda Cheryl Hachem, Anya V. Kleymenova
34241.abstract: A large literature at the intersection of economics and finance offers prescriptions for regulating banks to increase financial stability. This literature abstracts from the discretion that accounting standards give banks over financial reporting, creating a gap between the information assumed to be available to regulators in models of optimal regulation and the information available to regulators in reality. We bridge insights from the economics, finance, and accounting literatures to synthesize knowledge about the design and implementation of bank regulation and identify areas where more work is needed. We present a simple framework for organizing the relevant ideas, namely the externalities that motivate bank regulation, the rationales for allowing accounting discretion, and the use of discretion to circumvent regulation. Our takeaway from reviewing work in these areas is that academic studies of bank regulation and accounting discretion require a more unified approach to design optimal policy for the real world.
34241.zh_abstract: 经济学与金融学交叉领域的大量文献为监管银行以增强金融稳定性提供了处方。这些文献忽略了会计准则赋予银行在财务报告方面的自由裁量权，从而在最优监管模型假设监管者可获取的信息与现实监管者可获取的信息之间造成了差距。我们融合经济学、金融学和会计学文献的洞见，综合关于银行监管设计与实施的知识，并识别出需要进一步研究的领域。我们提出了一个简单的框架来组织相关观点，即：激发银行监管的外部性、允许会计自由裁量权的理由，以及利用自由裁量权规避监管的行为。回顾这些领域的研究后，我们的结论是：为现实世界设计最优政策，银行监管与会计自由裁量权的学术研究需要一种更加统一的方法。
34241.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：D62, E44, G21, G28, M41

34240.title: Automation-Induced Innovation Shift
34240.zh_title: 自动化引发的创新转向
34240.authors: Lin William Cong, Yao Lu, Hanqing Shi, Wu Zhu
34240.abstract: We study how exposure to automation affects the nature and level of corporate innovation, which informs how innovation begets innovation. We document that firms with high robot exposure alter their technological focus over time and shift innovative activities towards AI which automation naturally complements through data accumulation. The shift is more pronounced for firms with greater data generation or prior AI-related research experience. Because AI patents are more costly (e.g., in labor input), albeit more general and original, firms with high automation experience a significant rise in R&D expenditure but an initial drop in patent quantity, before benefiting—an innovation “J-Curve.” Our findings not only resolve the puzzle that globally firms invent less despite the greater research effort amidst rising automation, but also provides insights on the heterogeneous paths of innovation, all of which we rationalize in a parsimonious dynamic equilibrium model.
34240.zh_abstract: 我们研究了自动化暴露如何影响企业创新的性质与水平，这揭示了创新如何催生创新。我们记录到，机器人暴露程度高的企业会随时间改变其技术重点，并将创新活动转向人工智能——自动化通过数据积累自然与之互补。这种转向在数据生成能力更强或先前拥有人工智能相关研究经验的企业中更为显著。由于人工智能专利成本更高（例如在劳动力投入方面），尽管更具通用性和原创性，但自动化程度高的企业在受益之前，会经历研发支出显著上升但专利数量初期下降的过程——即创新的“J曲线”。我们的发现不仅解决了全球范围内企业在自动化程度上升背景下尽管研究投入更大但发明反而减少的谜题，还为创新的异质性路径提供了见解，所有这些我们都在一个简洁的动态均衡模型中进行了合理化解释。

34239.title: Social Substitution? Time Use Responses to Increased Workplace Isolation
34239.zh_title: 社会替代？工作场所隔离增加的时间使用反应
34239.authors: Benjamin W. Cowan, Todd R. Jones
34239.abstract: This paper examines how people adjust their time use when they experience an increase in time spent alone, which is a growing share of adults’ lives. We utilize the dramatic rise in remote work following the onset of the pandemic, which is associated with a large decline in time spent in the physical presence of non-household members during the workday, to observe the extent to which individuals substitute toward more in-person interactions in non-work settings. We first document that on days that individuals work from home, they spend 3.5 additional hours in activities spent entirely alone and over 5 fewer hours in activities that include any non-household members. We then use a difference-in-difference strategy to ask what happens to time allocations when workers are induced toward remote work by analyzing changes over time in how workers in teleworkable occupations—who experienced the lion’s share of the post-COVID increase in remote work—spend their time relative to workers in non-teleworkable occupations. Averaging over all days of the week, we see a relative increase in time spent in activities spent entirely alone by 32 minutes and a decrease in activities that include any non-household members by 38 minutes for workers in teleworkable jobs. Normalizing by the increase in average daily remote work time (46 minutes), these estimates are of a similar magnitude to what we observe in our descriptive analysis. When individuals are induced to work from home, they exhibit almost no substitution toward spending more time with others who are not in their household to make up for the loss of time with others at work.
34239.zh_abstract: 本文研究了当人们独处时间增加时（这已成为成年人生活中日益增长的一部分），他们如何调整时间使用。我们利用疫情爆发后远程工作急剧增加的现象——这与工作日内与非家庭成员共处的时间大幅下降相关——来观察个体在非工作环境中是否会用更多面对面互动来替代。我们首先记录到，在居家办公的日子里，个体完全独处的活动时间增加了3.5小时，而包含任何非家庭成员的活动时间减少了超过5小时。接着，我们采用双重差分策略，通过分析可远程工作职业的工人（他们承担了疫情后远程工作增长的大部分）与不可远程工作职业的工人相比，其时间分配随时间的变化，来探究当工人被诱导转向远程工作时时间分配会发生什么变化。平均到一周的所有日子，我们看到可远程工作职业的工人完全独处的活动时间相对增加了32分钟，而包含任何非家庭成员的活动时间减少了38分钟。按日均远程工作时间增加量（46分钟）进行标准化后，这些估计值与我们描述性分析中观察到的幅度相似。当个体被诱导居家办公时，他们几乎没有表现出用与非家庭成员共度更多时间来弥补工作中与他人相处时间损失的替代行为。

34238.title: Measuring Neighborhood Change: The Issue of Ex Post Borders
34238.zh_title: 衡量社区变迁：事后边界问题
34238.authors: Edward L. Glaeser, Joseph Gyourko, Braydon Neiszner
34238.abstract: Do more populous neighborhoods grow less quickly than less populous areas? Is local housing price growth associated with initial population density? The Longitudinal Tract Data Base’s (LTDB) panel of Census tracts is the standard tool for measuring neighborhood change. The LTDB is based on 2010 Census tract boundaries, and Census tracts are partially designed so that they have a similar level of population. In this paper, we show that defining neighborhoods to equalize ex post population levels can significantly impact estimated coefficients in regressions in which population changes are regressed on initial population levels or with variables that are correlated with initial population levels. Most obviously, if neighborhood populations are ex post equalized, then a regression of population change on initial population must yield a coefficient of -1. We address this challenge by offering five alternative panels of tracts using 1970, 1980 and 1990 boundaries, which can be thought of as ‘reverse LTDBs’. The significant mean reversion of both population and housing units that appear in the LTDB before 2000 either dramatically ameliorates or reverses using the reverse LTDB. Comparing the LTDB with the reverse LTDB also finds that using tracts based on ex post borders also can influence estimated growth relationships where other tract-level attributes such as house price are correlated with initial population levels. This does not imply that using ex ante borders always is superior; earlier borders almost always means fewer observations, especially in rapidly growing areas.
34238.zh_abstract: 人口较多的社区是否比人口较少的地区增长更慢？当地房价增长是否与初始人口密度相关？纵向追踪数据库（LTDB）的人口普查区面板是衡量社区变迁的标准工具。LTDB基于2010年人口普查区边界，而人口普查区的部分设计目的是使其人口水平相似。在本文中，我们表明，为了事后均衡人口水平而定义社区，会显著影响回归中人口变化对初始人口水平或与初始人口水平相关变量进行回归时的估计系数。最明显的是，如果社区人口事后被均衡化，那么人口变化对初始人口的回归必然得出系数-1。我们通过提供五个使用1970年、1980年和1990年边界的替代面板（可视为“反向LTDB”）来应对这一挑战。LTDB中2000年之前出现的人口和住房单位的显著均值回归，在使用反向LTDB时要么大幅改善，要么逆转。比较LTDB与反向LTDB还发现，使用基于事后边界的社区，当其他社区层面属性（如房价）与初始人口水平相关时，也会影响估计的增长关系。这并不意味着使用事前边界总是更优；更早的边界几乎总是意味着更少的观测值，尤其是在快速增长地区。

34237.title: Regulating Biological Resources: Lessons From Marine Fisheries in the United States
34237.zh_title: 监管生物资源：来自美国海洋渔业的教训
34237.abstract: In 1996, with United States fish populations in decline, Congress overhauled fishing laws with scientific thresholds for rebuilding overfished stocks. The law's impact is contested, and lawmakers have spent over a decade debating its reauthorization while countries around the world consider similar policies. We develop the first causally interpretable evaluation of this law, exploiting the fact that the European Union has comparable fisheries but only recently developed similar laws. Compiling comprehensive data on US and EU fishery status and management, we examine fish populations that decline to unhealthy levels and measure the effect of a policy that aims to rebuild them to health. We find treated populations increase by 52 percent relative to these counterfactuals, with both catch and revenue rebounding to baseline levels or greater. Analyzing fisheries' revenue, we find net present values are higher for at least 69 percent of rebuilt stocks compared to simulated counterfactuals.
34237.zh_abstract: 1996年，随着美国鱼类种群数量下降，国会全面修订了渔业法律，设定了重建过度捕捞种群的科学阈值。该法律的影响存在争议，立法者已花费十多年时间讨论其重新授权问题，而世界各国也在考虑类似政策。我们首次对该法律进行了因果可解释的评估，利用了欧盟拥有可比渔业但直到最近才制定类似法律这一事实。通过汇编美国和欧盟渔业状况与管理的全面数据，我们研究了鱼类种群下降到不健康水平的情况，并衡量了旨在将其重建至健康水平的政策效果。我们发现，相对于这些反事实，受处理种群增加了52%，捕捞量和收入均恢复至基线水平或更高。分析渔业收入后，我们发现，与模拟的反事实相比，至少69%的已重建种群的净现值更高。

34236.title: Tariffs, Manufacturing Employment, and Supply Chains
34236.zh_title: 关税、制造业就业与供应链
34236.abstract: I use a dynamic general-equilibrium model with supply-chain adjustment frictions to study the effects of tariffs on manufacturing employment. The model has four distinct manufacturing sectors: upstream goods with high trade elasticities (“oil”); upstream goods with low trade elasticities (“steel”); downstream goods with high trade elasticities (“toys”); and downstream goods with low trade elasticities (“cars”). I find that tariffs can increase overall manufacturing employment in the long run, but are likely to reduce it in the short run, and cause more reallocation of workers across these individual sectors than overall employment growth
34236.zh_abstract: 我使用一个包含供应链调整摩擦的动态一般均衡模型来研究关税对制造业就业的影响。该模型包含四个不同的制造业部门：高贸易弹性的上游商品（“石油”）；低贸易弹性的上游商品（“钢铁”）；高贸易弹性的下游商品（“玩具”）；以及低贸易弹性的下游商品（“汽车”）。我发现，关税长期内可以增加整体制造业就业，但短期内可能减少就业，并且与整体就业增长相比，会导致工人在这些不同部门之间进行更多的重新配置。
34236.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI；JEL：F11, F13, F15, F17, F41, F66

34235.title: Is Managed Care Effective in Long-term Care Settings? Evidence from Medicare Institutional Special Needs Plans
34235.zh_title: 管理式医疗在长期护理环境中有效吗？来自医疗保险机构特殊需求计划的证据
34235.authors: Momotazur Rahman, Brian McGarry, Elizabeth M. White, David C. Grabowski, Cyrus M. Kosar
34235.abstract: Nursing homes face unique financial incentives that encourage under-investment in onsite clinical capabilities and overreliance on hospitals to triage and care for residents with dementia, contributing to high levels of health care spending for this population. A proposed solution to align incentives are Institutional Special Needs Plans (I-SNPs), which combine capitated financing with plan-provided onsite clinician presence. Using 12 million resident-quarters of data from 2016-2022, we exploit the timing of nursing homes’ I-SNP contracting to instrument for plan enrollment and estimate causal effects on hospitalization and other health outcomes. We found that I-SNP enrollment reduced quarterly hospitalization rates by 3 to 4 percentage points, which equates to one third of hospitalizations relative to the sample mean. We do not find consistent evidence of an impact on other health outcomes and quality of care indicators.
34235.zh_abstract: 养老院面临独特的财务激励，这鼓励了其在现场临床能力方面的投资不足，并过度依赖医院来分诊和护理患有痴呆症的居民，从而导致该人群的医疗支出水平较高。一个旨在协调激励的拟议解决方案是机构特殊需求计划（I-SNP），该计划将按人头付费的融资与计划提供的现场临床医生服务相结合。利用2016年至2022年1200万个居民季度的数据，我们利用养老院签订I-SNP合同的时间作为计划注册的工具变量，估计了对住院和其他健康结果的因果效应。我们发现，I-SNP注册使季度住院率降低了3到4个百分点，相对于样本均值，这相当于减少了三分之一的住院。我们没有发现对其它健康结果和护理质量指标产生一致影响的证据。

34234.title: The Foreign Currency Fisher Channel: Evidence from Households
34234.zh_title: 外币费雪渠道：来自家庭的证据
34234.authors: Győző Gyöngyösi, Judit Rariga, Emil Verner
34234.abstract: We study how foreign currency debt exposure shapes household adjustment to a large exchange rate depreciation. Using household survey and bank customer data during Hungary's 2008 currency crisis, we find that foreign currency borrowers cut consumption one-for-one with increased debt service, consistent with a foreign currency Fisher channel. Both the quantity and quality of expenditures decline, indicating a "flight from quality." Debt revaluation has a limited effect on overall labor supply, but there is substitution toward foreign income and home production. Our findings point to the relevance of open-economy models with incomplete markets, heterogeneous foreign currency exposures, and liquidity constraints.
34234.zh_abstract: 我们研究了外币债务敞口如何塑造家庭对大幅汇率贬值的调整。利用匈牙利2008年货币危机期间的家庭调查和银行客户数据，我们发现外币借款人的消费减少与债务偿还增加是一一对应的，这与外币费雪渠道一致。支出的数量和质量均出现下降，表明存在“逃离质量”现象。债务重估对总体劳动力供给的影响有限，但存在向国外收入和家庭生产的替代。我们的发现指出了具有不完全市场、异质性外币敞口和流动性约束的开放经济模型的相关性。
34234.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：D12, E20, E3, F3, F30, F31, F34, G01, G5, G51

34233.title: Misallocation due to Incomplete Markets
34233.zh_title: 不完全市场导致的资源错配
34233.abstract: We quantify misallocation caused by limited risk-sharing and imperfect consumption-smoothing within and across borders. We measure misallocation as the share of resources left over if financial markets are completed and consumers are compensated to maintain their status quo welfare. This measure is a multi-agent extension of Lucas’s (1987) consumption-equivalent variation and does not rely on a social welfare function or on interpersonal utility comparisons. We provide exact formulas and deadweight-loss triangle approximations that can be applied without specifying income processes or modeling households’ portfolio choices. We find that incomplete risk sharing across US households destroys the equivalent of about 20 percent of aggregate US consumption. Incomplete risk sharing across countries, abstracting from within-country heterogeneity, destroys the equivalent of roughly 5 percent of world consumption. The latter is driven by fast-growing countries such as China and India, while unexploited consumption-smoothing opportunities among countries at similar levels of development are much more limited. Thus, most of the potential gains from more complete markets come from insuring household-level risks domestically and from intertemporal trade between fast-growing and slower-growing countries, rather than from additional risk sharing among similarly advanced economies.
