34233.zh_abstract: 我们量化了由有限的风险分担以及国内外不完善的消费平滑所导致的资源错配。我们将资源错配衡量为：如果金融市场得以完善，且消费者获得补偿以维持其现状福利水平，那么将剩余下来的资源份额。这一衡量指标是卢卡斯（1987）消费等价变动的多主体扩展，不依赖于社会福利函数或人际效用比较。我们提供了精确公式和死重损失三角形近似方法，这些方法可以在不指定收入过程或建模家庭投资组合选择的情况下应用。我们发现，美国家庭之间不完全的风险分担破坏了相当于美国总消费约20%的资源。忽略国内异质性的国家间不完全风险分担，破坏了相当于世界消费约5%的资源。后者主要由中国和印度等快速增长国家驱动，而发展水平相近国家之间未利用的消费平滑机会则要有限得多。因此，更完善市场带来的大部分潜在收益，来自于对国内家庭层面风险进行保险，以及快速增长国家与较慢增长国家之间的跨期贸易，而非来自相似发达经济体之间的额外风险分担。
34233.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：E0, F0, F1, F30

34232.title: Should States Reduce Teacher Licensing Requirements? Evidence from the Rise of For-Profit Training Programs in Texas
34232.zh_title: 各州是否应降低教师资格要求？来自德克萨斯州营利性培训项目兴起的证据
34232.abstract: We provide a comprehensive analysis of a Texas policy that relaxed teacher licensing requirements and created a large for-profit training industry. Using detailed administrative data, we show that for-profit-trained teachers have higher turnover and lower value-added than standard-trained teachers. But the policy significantly increased the supply of certified teachers, reducing schools' reliance on uncertified teachers with even worse outcomes. Exploiting variation in policy exposure across schools, we find a zero net impact on student achievement due to these offsetting forces. Thus lower licensing requirements improved access to teaching and reduced training costs without harming students.
34232.zh_abstract: 我们对德克萨斯州一项放宽教师资格要求并催生大型营利性培训行业的政策进行了全面分析。利用详细的行政数据，我们表明，与标准培训的教师相比，营利性培训的教师离职率更高且增值效应更低。但该政策显著增加了认证教师的供给，减少了学校对结果更差的未认证教师的依赖。通过利用不同学校政策暴露程度的差异，我们发现，由于这些抵消力量，该政策对学生成绩的净影响为零。因此，降低资格要求在不损害学生利益的情况下，改善了教师准入并降低了培训成本。

34231.title: Happier at Work? The Impact of Working at an Employee-Owned Firm and Working from Home on Job Satisfaction
34231.zh_title: 工作中更快乐？在员工持股企业工作和在家工作对工作满意度的影响
34231.abstract: This paper examines the impact of working for an ESOP firm and Working-From-Home (WFH) on job satisfaction in the National Longitudinal Survey of Youth 1997 (NLSY97) and the General Social Science (GSS) survey. It finds that job satisfaction is higher for employees in ESOPs than for observationally similar workers in non-ESOP firms and for WFH workers than for their non-WFH peers. Fixed effect analysis of the NLSY97 finds that both ESOP and WFH employment raise job satisfaction for the same worker when he/she changes work status. The channels through which the two conditions raise satisfaction appear to differ: ESOPs raise satisfaction by increasing worker participation on collective workplace or firm decisions while WFH raise satisfaction by increasing worker flexibility in their individual work activity. Both participation and flexibility also raise job satisfaction independently. The data further show ESOPs had more extensive WFH than non-ESOP firms during the Covid-19 pandemic.
34231.zh_abstract: 本文利用1997年全国青年纵向调查（NLSY97）和综合社会调查（GSS）数据，考察了在员工持股计划（ESOP）企业工作以及在家工作（WFH）对工作满意度的影响。研究发现，在ESOP企业工作的员工比在非ESOP企业中观察特征相似的员工工作满意度更高，WFH员工也比非WFH同行满意度更高。对NLSY97的固定效应分析发现，当同一名员工改变工作状态时，ESOP和WFH就业均能提高其工作满意度。这两种条件提高满意度的渠道似乎不同：ESOP通过增加员工在工作场所或企业集体决策中的参与来提高满意度，而WFH则通过增加员工个人工作活动的灵活性来提高满意度。参与和灵活性本身也能独立地提高工作满意度。数据进一步显示，在新冠疫情期间，ESOP企业比非ESOP企业拥有更广泛的WFH安排。
34231.meta: Programs：IO, LS, POL；JEL：J28, J54, J81, M54, P1

34230.title: Preferences, Beliefs, and Demand for the Flu Vaccine
34230.zh_title: 偏好、信念与流感疫苗需求
34230.authors: Daniel W. Sacks, Justin R. Sydnor
34230.abstract: Can economic tools help inform the puzzlingly low rate of flu vaccination? Existing interventions focus on misinformation or nudges, not preferences over or beliefs about vaccine characteristics. Using an online experiment, we find a key role for effectiveness and short-run side-effects: equalizing only beliefs and preferences about these characteristics nearly eliminates the vaccination-intention gap between the vaccine hesitant and confident. Fear of needles, inconvenience, and perceived long run health risks play smaller roles. The vaccine hesitant hold pessimistic but plausible beliefs about effectiveness but greatly overestimate side-effect risks. We estimate the impact of correcting inaccurate beliefs and potential subsidies on vaccination rates.
34230.zh_abstract: 经济工具能否帮助解释令人困惑的低流感疫苗接种率？现有干预措施侧重于错误信息或助推，而非对疫苗特性的偏好或信念。通过一项在线实验，我们发现有效性和短期副作用是关键作用：仅使这些特性的信念和偏好均等化，就几乎消除了疫苗犹豫者与自信者之间的接种意愿差距。对针头的恐惧、不便以及感知的长期健康风险作用较小。疫苗犹豫者对有效性持有悲观但合理的信念，但严重高估了副作用风险。我们估计了纠正不准确信念和潜在补贴对疫苗接种率的影响。

34229.title: Latent Polarization
34229.authors: Klaus Desmet, Ignacio Ortuño-Ortín, Romain Wacziarg
34229.abstract: We develop a new method to endogenously partition society into groups based on homophily in values, using fractional hedonic games as a theoretical foundation. The between-group differentiation that results from this partition provides a novel measure of latent polarization in society. We implement this method empirically using U.S. data from the World Values Survey. For the last forty years, the degree of latent polarization of the U.S. public has been high and relatively stable. In contrast, the degree of values polarization between voters of the two main political parties has steadily increased since the 1990s, and is now converging toward that of underlying values-based clusters. Thus, growing partisan polarization in the U.S. is a reflection of partisan views becoming increasingly aligned with the main values-based clusters in society.
34229.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种新方法，基于价值观中的同质性，以分数享乐博弈为理论基础，将社会内生地划分为群体。这种划分产生的群体间差异，为社会中的潜在极化程度提供了一种新颖的衡量指标。我们利用美国世界价值观调查数据，在实证上实施了这一方法。在过去四十年中，美国公众的潜在极化程度一直较高且相对稳定。相比之下，自20世纪90年代以来，两大主要政党选民之间的价值观极化程度稳步上升，目前正趋近于基于价值观的潜在聚类内部的极化程度。因此，美国日益增长的党派极化，反映了党派观点与社会中主要价值观聚类日益一致的趋势。

34228.title: Five Facts About the First-Generation Excellence Gap
34228.zh_title: 关于第一代卓越差距的五个事实
34228.authors: Uditi Karna, John A. List, Andrew Simon, Haruka Uchida
34228.abstract: Parents are crucial to children’s educational success, but the role of parental education in fostering academic excellence remains underexplored. Using longitudinal administrative data covering all North Carolina public school students, we document five facts about first-generation excellence gaps. We find large excellence gaps emerge by 3rd grade across all demographics and persist through high school. Yet, socioeconomic status and school quality explain only one-third of the gaps. The overarching facts reveal that excellence gaps reflect deeper challenges rooted in parental human capital that manifest early and compound over time, rather than merely consequences of socioeconomic disadvantage or school quality differences.
34228.zh_abstract: 父母对子女的教育成功至关重要，但父母教育在培养学术卓越方面的作用仍未得到充分探索。利用覆盖北卡罗来纳州所有公立学校学生的纵向行政数据，我们记录了关于第一代卓越差距的五个事实。我们发现，到三年级时，在所有人口统计群体中都出现了巨大的卓越差距，并持续到高中。然而，社会经济地位和学校质量仅能解释这些差距的三分之一。这些总体事实表明，卓越差距反映了根植于父母人力资本的更深层次挑战，这些挑战很早就显现出来，并随时间推移而加剧，而不仅仅是社会经济劣势或学校质量差异的后果。

34284.title: The Dynamics of Technology Transfer: Multinational Investment in China and Rising Global Competition
34284.zh_title: 技术转让的动态：跨国公司在华投资与日益激烈的全球竞争
34284.authors: Jaedo Choi, George Cui, Younghun Shim, Yongseok Shin
34284.abstract: US multinationals formed joint ventures in China for market access and lower labor costs. However, these ventures transfer technology to Chinese firms, fueling future competition. While individual firms weigh the risks to their own profits, they disregard the negative impact on other US firms and the broader economy, resulting in an over-investment that may reduce the US welfare. In our empirical analysis, industries with more joint ventures in China show positive spillovers to Chinese firms but negative outcomes for firms in the US. We develop a two-country model with oligopolistic competition, innovation, and joint ventures. For the US, the short-run gains from joint ventures are outweighed by long-run losses due to rising Chinese competition. Joint ventures benefit large US firms at the expense of small firms and the real wages of workers. A ban on joint ventures since 1999 would have boosted US welfare by 1.2 percent.
34284.zh_abstract: 美国跨国公司为了进入中国市场并获得较低劳动力成本而组建合资企业。然而，这些合资企业将技术转让给中国企业，助长了未来的竞争。虽然单个企业会权衡对其自身利润的风险，但它们忽视了其他美国企业和整体经济的负面影响，导致过度投资，可能降低美国福利。在我们的实证分析中，在中国合资企业较多的行业显示出对中国企业的正向溢出效应，但对美国企业则产生负面结果。我们开发了一个包含寡头竞争、创新和合资企业的两国模型。对美国而言，合资企业的短期收益被因中国竞争加剧而产生的长期损失所抵消。合资企业使大型美国企业受益，但以牺牲小企业和工人实际工资为代价。自1999年起禁止合资企业将使美国福利提高1.2%。

34283.title: The Changing Nature of International Trade and its Implications for Development
34283.zh_title: 国际贸易性质的变化及其对发展的影响
34283.abstract: This paper revisits the relationship between international trade, trade policy, and development in light of the structural, policy, and geopolitical shifts that have transformed globalization over the past decade. While trade has historically supported development through both static and dynamic channels, we argue that the latter—those inducing structural transformation and institutional change—have been far more consequential for long-run development. Through access to global markets, participation in global value chains, and knowledge and technology transfers, and by providing an anchor for reform, trade and trade agreements have contributed to productivity gains, technological progress, quality and skill upgrading, and institutional change in many low- and middle-income countries. Yet, the conditions that enabled these effects—technologically driven declines in transportation and communication costs, fragmentation of the production process, liberal trade regimes, multilateralism and geopolitical stability—are changing. Automation, digitization, climate change, the return of industrial policy in advanced economies, and the rise of geopolitical rivalry are reshaping the global trade environment. In this new context, the scope for replicating past export-led growth successes is unlikely as two key growth mechanisms, access to the lucrative markets of advanced economies and knowledge sharing, are under threat. We discuss whether trade in services and the green transition may offer new opportunities, emphasizing that future prospects will depend on policy choices in large economies and the adaptability of developing countries.
34283.zh_abstract: 本文重新审视了国际贸易、贸易政策与发展之间的关系，以应对过去十年中改变全球化的结构性、政策和地缘政治转变。虽然贸易历来通过静态和动态渠道支持发展，但我们认为后者——那些引发结构转型和制度变革的渠道——对长期发展更为重要。通过进入全球市场、参与全球价值链、知识和技术转让，以及为改革提供锚定，贸易和贸易协定为许多低收入和中等收入国家的生产率提升、技术进步、质量和技能升级以及制度变革做出了贡献。然而，促成这些效应的条件——技术驱动的运输和通信成本下降、生产流程的碎片化、自由化的贸易体制、多边主义和地缘政治稳定——正在发生变化。自动化、数字化、气候变化、发达经济体产业政策的回归以及地缘政治竞争的加剧正在重塑全球贸易环境。在这种新背景下，复制过去出口导向型增长成功的可能性不大，因为两个关键的增长机制——进入发达经济体利润丰厚的市场和知识共享——正受到威胁。我们讨论了服务贸易和绿色转型是否可能提供新的机遇，强调未来的前景将取决于大型经济体的政策选择和发展中国家的适应能力。

34282.title: Riding to Opportunity: Geographic and Household Effects from the Orphan Trains
34282.zh_title: 乘着机遇前行：孤儿列车的地理与家庭效应
34282.abstract: Between 1854 and 1929, approximately 200,000 children were transported from East Coast cities to new homes in the American West, motivated by the theory that a change of geography and household environment can transform lives. We leverage quasi-experimental variation in child placements to evaluate both whether being sent West improved outcomes relative to remaining in New York institutions, and whether variation in destination and foster household characteristics affected later life success. Linking tens of thousands of ``orphan train'' riders and comparable non-relocated children to Census records through 1940, we find no systematic evidence that relocation itself improved adult economic outcomes. Among children sent West, substantial variation in county-level economic opportunities also did not predict adult success. In contrast, the individual foster household income predicts children's later incomes, with an estimated intergenerational elasticity of about 0.2.
34282.zh_abstract: 在1854年至1929年间，大约有20万名儿童从东海岸城市被运送到美国西部的新家庭，其动机是认为改变地理和家庭环境可以改变人生。我们利用儿童安置的准实验性变化来评估：被送往西部是否比留在纽约机构中能改善结果，以及目的地和寄养家庭特征的差异是否影响后来的生活成功。我们将数万名“孤儿列车”乘客和可比的非迁移儿童与截至1940年的人口普查记录进行关联，发现没有系统性证据表明迁移本身改善了成年后的经济结果。在被送往西部的儿童中，县级经济机会的巨大差异也不能预测成年后的成功。相比之下，个体寄养家庭的收入可以预测儿童后来的收入，估计的代际弹性约为0.2。

34281.title: Supply-Side Opioid Restrictions and the Retail Pharmacy Market
34281.zh_title: 供给侧阿片类药物限制与零售药店市场
34281.authors: Anne M. Burton, Brandyn F. Churchill
34281.abstract: While policymakers routinely limit the sale of goods thought to be of risk to public health, relatively less is known about whether and how these policies affect firm performance. Using 2000-2018 National Establishment Time-Series data and a difference-in-differences strategy, we show that state “pill mill” laws intended to reduce the overprescribing of opioids reduced retail pharmacy sales and employment. These reductions were most pronounced in highly competitive areas and for standalone pharmacies – two characteristics associated with pharmacy drug diversion. Meanwhile, pharmacies located across the border in states without a pill mill law experienced increases in sales and employment. Next, we show that state pill mill laws were associated with an increase in standalone pharmacy closures, though the total number of pharmacies was unchanged. Our results are consistent with these laws adversely affecting pharmacies filling inappropriate opioid prescriptions without meaningfully altering patient access to retail pharmacies.
34281.zh_abstract: 尽管政策制定者经常限制被认为对公共健康有风险的商品的销售，但关于这些政策是否以及如何影响企业绩效，我们知之甚少。利用2000-2018年国家企业时间序列数据和双重差分策略，我们发现旨在减少阿片类药物过度处方的州级“药丸工厂”法律降低了零售药店的销售额和就业。这些减少在竞争激烈的地区和独立药店中最为显著——这两个特征与药店药物分流相关。与此同时，位于没有药丸工厂法律的州边境地区的药店，其销售额和就业有所增加。接下来，我们表明州级药丸工厂法律与独立药店关闭的增加相关，尽管药店总数没有变化。我们的结果与这些法律对开具不当阿片类药物处方的药店产生不利影响，但并未显著改变患者对零售药店的可及性这一结论一致。

34280.title: Drivers of Digital Payment Adoption: Lessons from Brazil, Costa Rica, and Mexico
34280.zh_title: 数字支付采纳的驱动因素：来自巴西、哥斯达黎加和墨西哥的经验
34280.authors: David Argente, Paula Gonzalez Alvarez, Esteban Méndez, Diana Van Patten
34280.abstract: Digital payment platforms can displace cash and extend financial services to underserved populations, yet many adults worldwide remain unbanked. Leveraging granular microdata on individual transactions and user characteristics, we argue that broad cash substitution via peer-to-peer (P2P) platforms depends on a “rapid low income-gradient”, the speed at which adoption spreads from affluent early users to lower-income groups. In three Latin American cases, Brazil’s Pix, Costa Rica’s Sinpe Móvil, and Mexico’s CoDi, we document that low adoption costs, strong network effects, coordinated supply-side integration, and early awareness efforts enabled Pix and Sinpe Móvil to reach nearly all income segments within five years, whereas CoDi remains characterized by low usage and predominantly high-income adopters.
34280.zh_abstract: 数字支付平台可以取代现金并将金融服务扩展到服务不足的人群，然而全球许多成年人仍然没有银行账户。利用关于个人交易和用户特征的细粒度微观数据，我们认为通过点对点平台实现广泛的现金替代取决于“快速低收入梯度”，即采纳从富裕的早期用户向低收入群体扩散的速度。在三个拉丁美洲案例中——巴西的Pix、哥斯达黎加的Sinpe Móvil和墨西哥的CoDi——我们记录了低采纳成本、强大的网络效应、协调的供给侧整合以及早期的认知推广努力，使得Pix和Sinpe Móvil在五年内几乎覆盖了所有收入阶层，而CoDi仍然以低使用率和主要高收入采纳者为特征。
34280.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, ME；JEL：E4, E5, O10, O2

34279.title: Firm Capacity Underutilization and the Measurement of Productivity
34279.zh_title: 企业产能利用不足与生产率测量
34279.authors: Margaret S. McMillan, Hundanol A. Kebede
34279.abstract: When estimating a production function, economists usually assume that firms fully employ all their available inputs. Contrary to this assumption, we document that underemployment of quasi-fixed inputs or low capacity utilization rates (CUR) is common across firms, especially in poor countries. Low CURs are correlated with supply-side constraints such as shortages of material inputs and electricity; they are also correlated with demand-side constraints such as a lack of access to markets. We show that when firms underemploy their quasi-fixed inputs, the assumptions behind standard production function estimation techniques-such as the control function approach-are invalid, and these techniques produce biased estimates of TFP. We demonstrate this using unique panel data from Ethiopia with information on actual and full capacity input demand. We find that measures of TFP that do not account for CUR considerably underestimate ’true’ productivity when CUR is low but not when CUR is high. This leads to an exaggeration of the TFP gap between rich and poor countries.
34279.zh_abstract: 在估计生产函数时，经济学家通常假设企业充分利用其所有可用投入。与这一假设相反，我们记录了准固定投入利用不足或低产能利用率在企业中很常见，尤其是在贫穷国家。低产能利用率与供给侧约束（如原材料和电力短缺）相关；它们也与需求侧约束（如缺乏市场准入）相关。我们表明，当企业未充分利用其准固定投入时，标准生产函数估计技术（如控制函数方法）背后的假设是无效的，并且这些技术会产生有偏的全要素生产率估计。我们利用来自埃塞俄比亚的独特面板数据（包含实际和满负荷投入需求信息）证明了这一点。我们发现，未考虑产能利用率的全要素生产率指标在产能利用率低时会显著低估“真实”生产率，但在产能利用率高时则不会。这导致了对富国和穷国之间全要素生产率差距的夸大。

34278.title: Clean Rides, Healthy Lives: The Impact of Electric Vehicle Adoption on Air Quality and Infant Health
34278.zh_title: 清洁出行，健康生活：电动汽车采纳对空气质量和婴儿健康的影响
34278.authors: Cavit Baran, Janet Currie, Bahadir Dursun, Erdal Tekin
34278.abstract: This paper provides the first nationwide U.S. evidence on the effects of electric vehicle (EV) adoption on air quality and child health. Using county-level data from 2010–2021, we link EV registrations to air pollution, birth outcomes, and emergency department visits. Endogenous adoption is addressed using two-way fixed effects and an instrumental variables strategy exploiting the rollout of federally designated Alternative Fuel Corridors. Greater EV adoption significantly lowers nitrogen dioxide and improves infant and child health, reducing very low birth weight, prematurity, and asthma-related emergency visits. The largest health gains occur in high-pollution areas and exceed $\$1.2$–$\$4.0$ billion annually.
34278.zh_abstract: 本文提供了首个全美范围内关于电动汽车采纳对空气质量和儿童健康影响的证据。利用2010-2021年的县级数据，我们将电动汽车注册量与空气污染、出生结果和急诊就诊联系起来。通过双向固定效应和利用联邦指定的替代燃料走廊推广的工具变量策略，我们解决了内生采纳问题。更高的电动汽车采纳显著降低了二氧化氮水平，并改善了婴儿和儿童健康，减少了极低出生体重、早产和哮喘相关的急诊就诊。最大的健康收益出现在高污染地区，每年超过12亿至40亿美元。
34278.meta: Programs：CH, EEE, EH；JEL：I14, I18, Q53, R38

34277.title: Interest Rate Caps and Credit Supply: Locking Out the Small Borrower in the Great Depression
34277.zh_title: 利率上限与银行贷款供给：大萧条时期对小借款人的排斥
34277.abstract: We examine the effects of changes in an interest rate cap on small loan brokers in New Jersey during the Great Depression. Using newly constructed data on brokers and banks, we find that small loans declined sharply when the cap was lowered, and despite worsening economic conditions, they rebounded when the cap was raised back up. Consumers could not obtain alternative credit from banks, effectively shutting them out of the market. The cap had a permanent impact on the small loan market due to the large number of broker closures, thereby further reducing the availability of small loans and increasing market concentration. Our findings highlight the fundamental trade-off faced by policymakers: strict rate caps may protect borrowers from predatory lending but can eliminate necessary credit options for vulnerable populations.
34277.zh_abstract: 我们研究了大萧条时期新泽西州小额贷款经纪人利率上限变化的影响。利用新构建的经纪人和银行数据，我们发现当利率上限降低时，小额贷款急剧下降，尽管经济状况恶化，但当利率上限回升时，小额贷款又反弹了。消费者无法从银行获得替代信贷，实际上被排除在市场之外。由于大量经纪人关闭，利率上限对小额贷款市场产生了永久性影响，从而进一步减少了小额贷款的可得性并增加了市场集中度。我们的发现凸显了政策制定者面临的基本权衡：严格的利率上限可能保护借款人免受掠夺性贷款之害，但可能消除弱势群体必要的信贷选择。

34276.title: Climate Risk Exposure and Firms’ Climate Strategies
34276.zh_title: 气候风险暴露与企业的气候战略
34276.abstract: When exposed to greater physical and transition climate risks, are firms more likely to engage in climate mitigation, climate adaptation, or/and political strategies? This study examines this question and finds that firms exposed to greater physical and transition climate risks are less likely to undertake substantial mitigation efforts. Instead, they pursue other strategies. Specifically, firms exposed to greater physical climate risks are more inclined to pursue adaptation strategies, while firms facing higher transition climate risks are more likely to engage in anti-climate political strategies (such as lobbying against climate policies). The intensity of how firms manage their climate risks is influenced by their time horizon: the more myopic they are, the less they engage in climate mitigation and the more they oppose climate-friendly policies, thereby decreasing transition risks today while worsening their exposure to future physical and transition climate risks. Overall, this study provides insights into the (lack of) preparedness of the corporate sector for heightened climate risks.
34276.zh_abstract: 当面临更大的物理和转型气候风险时，企业是否更有可能采取气候减缓、气候适应和/或政治战略？本研究探讨了这一问题，发现面临更大物理和转型气候风险的企业不太可能进行实质性的减缓努力。相反，它们追求其他战略。具体来说，面临更大物理气候风险的企业更倾向于采取适应战略，而面临更高转型气候风险的企业更有可能参与反气候政治战略（例如游说反对气候政策）。企业管理气候风险的强度受其时间视野的影响：企业越短视，就越少参与气候减缓，越反对气候友好政策，从而降低当前的转型风险，同时加剧未来对物理和转型气候风险的暴露。总体而言，本研究提供了关于企业部门对加剧的气候风险（缺乏）准备情况的见解。
34276.meta: Programs：EEE, PR；JEL：D72, G34, L21, M14, Q54, Q56, Q58

34275.title: Asset Elasticities and Currency Risk Transfer
34275.zh_title: 资产弹性与货币风险转移
34275.authors: Carol Bertaut, Ester Faia, Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan, Camilo Marchesini, Simon Paetzold, Martin Schmitz
34275.abstract: We use administrative security-level data from the U.S. and Euro Area (EA) portfolios to estimate asset demand and supply elasticities by exploiting exogenous variation in bond-specific currency wedges. Employing a Bartik-style shift-share identification approach, we document extensive heterogeneity in investor demand responsiveness to exogenous changes in the price of currency risk, conditional on the issuer characteristics. Demand for AE-bonds is always inelastic, whereas for EM-bonds, elasticity depends on investor type and currency: insurance/pension, nonbanks and banks have finite-elastic demand for EM-bonds that are issued in their own (investor) currency. For EM-issuer-currency bonds, only EA non-bank investors increase the share of these bonds in their portfolio when currency wedges widen, suggesting they accept higher currency risk for higher returns. In response, issuers adjust their supply endogenously: an exogenous increase of 8 basis point in currency wedges leads to a 0.26% decline in local currency bond issuance relative to GDP. We develop a theoretical framework where debt issuance decisions take into account heterogenous demand of investors in terms of their response to changes in the price of currency risk.
34275.zh_abstract: 我们利用来自美国和欧元区投资组合的行政级别证券数据，通过利用债券特定货币楔子的外生变化来估计资产需求和供给弹性。采用巴蒂克式转移份额识别方法，我们记录了投资者需求对货币风险价格外生变化的响应存在广泛的异质性，且取决于发行者特征。对发达经济体债券的需求总是缺乏弹性的，而对于新兴市场债券，弹性取决于投资者类型和货币：保险公司/养老金、非银行机构和银行对以其自身（投资者）货币发行的新兴市场债券具有有限弹性需求。对于新兴市场发行者货币债券，只有当货币楔子扩大时，欧元区非银行投资者才会增加这些债券在其投资组合中的份额，这表明他们为了更高的回报而接受更高的货币风险。作为回应，发行者内生地调整其供给：货币楔子外生增加8个基点导致本币债券发行相对于GDP下降0.26%。我们开发了一个理论框架，其中债务发行决策考虑了投资者在响应货币风险价格变化方面的异质性需求。

34274.title: Why Don’t Struggling Students Do Their Homework? Disentangling Motivation and Study Productivity as Drivers of Human Capital Formation
34274.zh_title: 为什么学习困难的学生不做作业？区分动机和学习效率作为人力资本形成的驱动因素
34274.authors: Christopher Cotton, Brent R. Hickman, John A. List, Joseph Price, Sutanuka Roy
34274.abstract: Using field-experimental data (study-time tracking and randomized incentives), we identify a structural model of learning. Student effort is influenced by external costs/benefits and unobserved heterogeneity: motivation (willingness to study) and productivity (conversion rate of time into skill). We estimate academic labor-supply elasticities and skill technology. Productivity and motivation are uncorrelated. Low productivity, not low motivation, is the stronger predictor of academic struggles. School quality augments productivity and accelerates skill production. We find that dynamic skill complementarities arise mainly from children’s aging and from a feedback loop between investment activity and productivity, rather than from carrying forward past skill stocks.
34274.zh_abstract: 利用实地实验数据（学习时间追踪和随机激励），我们识别了一个学习结构模型。学生努力受到外部成本/收益和未观测到的异质性的影响：动机（学习意愿）和效率（时间转化为技能的转化率）。我们估计了学术劳动供给弹性和技能技术。效率与动机不相关。低效率，而非低动机，是学业困难更强的预测因素。学校质量提高了效率并加速了技能生产。我们发现，动态技能互补性主要源于儿童的成长以及投资活动与效率之间的反馈循环，而非源于过去技能存量的延续。
34274.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：C90, C92, C93, I21, I22, I24, J24, O15

34273.title: How Do Financial Conditions Affect Professional Conduct? Evidence from Opioid Prescriptions
34273.zh_title: 财务状况如何影响职业行为？来自阿片类药物处方的证据
34273.authors: Isil Erel, Shan Ge, Pengfei Ma
34273.abstract: We examine how healthcare providers’ opioid prescriptions are affected by changes in their home values, which proxy for shocks to their wealth. We find that providers increase opioid prescriptions when experiencing adverse financial conditions. Results are robust to including provider office–year fixed effects and using the subsample of providers who live far away from their offices, thereby largely ruling out a patient–demand explanation. Providers living in ZIP codes with price changes in the bottom half in 2007–2009 increased their opioid prescriptions in 2010–2012 by approximately 16% more than others. The effect is stronger among providers facing more provider competition and those serving vulnerable populations. Providers experiencing adverse financial conditions also receive more opioid-related payments from pharmaceutical companies. We also extend our analysis to ADHD medications, demonstrating a similar pattern of increased prescriptions under negative financial shocks, suggesting broader implications for other medical decisions. Our findings offer novel insights into professional conduct under personal financial pressure, with implications extending beyond healthcare.
34273.zh_abstract: 我们研究了医疗保健提供者的阿片类药物处方如何受到其房屋价值变化的影响，房屋价值变化作为其财富冲击的代理变量。我们发现，当医疗保健提供者经历不利的财务状况时，他们会增加阿片类药物的处方。该结果在纳入提供者办公室-年份固定效应以及使用居住在远离其办公室的提供者子样本时依然稳健，从而在很大程度上排除了患者需求的解释。在2007-2009年间，居住在房价变化处于后半部分的邮政编码地区的提供者，在2010-2012年间其阿片类药物处方量比其他提供者高出约16%。这种效应在面临更多提供者竞争以及服务于弱势群体的提供者中更为显著。经历不利财务状况的提供者也从制药公司获得了更多与阿片类药物相关的付款。我们还将分析扩展到注意力缺陷多动障碍（ADHD）药物，发现在负面财务冲击下处方量也呈现类似的增加模式，这表明该发现对其他医疗决策具有更广泛的意义。我们的研究结果为个人财务压力下的职业行为提供了新颖的见解，其影响超出了医疗保健领域。
34273.meta: Programs：CF；JEL：G51, I11, I13, I14, I18, R30

34272.title: Measuring Market Power in Network-Constrained Markets
34272.zh_title: 在受网络约束的市场中衡量市场势力
34272.abstract: Producers in locational pricing markets have the ability to exercise market power by impacting the extent to which transport capacity constraints bind. We extend the single-location residual demand curve concept to a residual demand hypersurface that quantifies the impact of a supplier’s output change at one location on prices at all locations. This concept improves our ability to explain the offers suppliers submit in the Italian locational pricing electricity market and demonstrates why the locations of a firm’s generation capacity determines the size and direction of locational price changes associated with the divestment of a fixed amount of generation capacity.
34272.zh_abstract: 在分区定价市场中，生产者能够通过影响运输容量约束的紧度来行使市场势力。我们将单一地点的剩余需求曲线概念扩展为一个剩余需求超曲面，该超曲面量化了供应商在一个地点的产出变化对所有地点价格的影响。这一概念提高了我们解释供应商在意大利分区定价电力市场中所提交报价的能力，并展示了为何一家公司的发电容量所在地决定了与剥离固定数量发电容量相关的分区价格变化的大小和方向。

34271.title: When Will Entrepreneurs Choose to Make Themselves Replaceable?
34271.zh_title: 企业家何时会选择让自己变得可被替代？
34271.abstract: This paper examines when and why entrepreneurs choose to standardise their ventures and make themselves replaceable, extending Rajan's (2012) analysis within a property rights framework. A model is developed where entrepreneurs face finite pools of potential replacements and may remain with their ventures post-IPO, rather than retiring as in Rajan's setting. The analysis yields two main results. First, when worker effort is fully contractible, entrepreneurs never choose to standardise, preferring to remain irreplaceable to maximise their bargaining power. Second, when key workers exert non-contractible effort that affects firm value, standardisation becomes beneficial as it motivates worker performance while managing the entrepreneur's replaceability. The optimal level of standardisation increases with the entrepreneur's equity stake, creating a ``dead zone" where entrepreneurs retain control but will not sell to outsiders. I extend the model to allow replacement of both entrepreneurs and workers, showing that standardisation can serve to reduce the bargaining power of all participants. The findings provide testable predictions about the relationship between equity structures, replacement market depth, and organisational design choices, while highlighting the strategic trade-offs entrepreneurs face between maintaining founder-specific advantages and creating transferable value for investors.
34271.zh_abstract: 本文研究了企业家何时以及为何选择标准化其企业并让自己变得可被替代，在产权框架内扩展了Rajan（2012）的分析。我们建立了一个模型，其中企业家面临有限的潜在替代者池，并且可能在首次公开募股后仍留在其企业中，而不是像Rajan的设定那样退休。分析得出两个主要结果。首先，当工人的努力完全可契约化时，企业家从不选择标准化，而是倾向于保持不可替代性以最大化其议价能力。其次，当关键工人付出影响企业价值的不可契约化努力时，标准化变得有益，因为它能激励工人绩效，同时管理企业家的可替代性。最优标准化程度随着企业家股权份额的增加而增加，从而产生一个“死区”，即企业家保留控制权但不会将企业出售给外部人。我将模型扩展到允许企业家和工人均被替代，表明标准化可以用于降低所有参与者的议价能力。这些发现提供了关于股权结构、替代市场深度与组织设计选择之间关系的可检验预测，同时强调了企业家在维持创始人特定优势与为投资者创造可转移价值之间所面临的战略权衡。

34270.title: Moving for Good: Educational Gains from Leaving Violence Behind
34270.zh_title: 为美好而迁徙：远离暴力带来的教育收益
34270.abstract: This paper estimates the effects of moving away from violent environments into safer areas on migrants' academic achievement in the context of the Mexican war on drugs. Using student location choices across space and over time, we recover individual-level migration paths for elementary school students across all municipalities in Mexico. We find that students who were induced to leave violent areas due to increased violence experience academic gains after relocating to safer areas. Students who migrated from municipalities in the 90th percentile of the violence distribution to municipalities in the 10th percentile experienced improvements of 5.3 percent of a standard deviation in their test scores two years after they migrated. These results appear to be explained by increases in school attendance and improvements in the learning environment after they moved.
34270.zh_abstract: 本文在墨西哥毒品战争的背景下，估计了从暴力环境迁移到更安全地区对移民学业成绩的影响。利用学生在空间和时间上的位置选择，我们恢复了墨西哥所有城市小学生的个人迁移路径。我们发现，因暴力加剧而被诱导离开暴力地区的学生，在迁移到更安全地区后经历了学业上的提升。从暴力分布第90百分位的城市迁移到第10百分位的城市的学生，在迁移两年后，其考试成绩提高了标准差的5.3%。这些结果似乎可以通过迁移后入学率的提高和学习环境的改善来解释。

34269.title: More Girls, Fewer Blues: Peer Gender Ratios and Adolescent Mental Health
34269.zh_title: 更多女孩，更少忧郁：同伴性别比例与青少年心理健康
34269.abstract: Using individual-level data from the Add Health surveys, we leverage idiosyncratic variation in gender composition across cohorts within the same school to examine whether being exposed to a higher share of female peers affects mental health and school satisfaction. We find that being exposed to a higher proportion of female peers, despite only improving school satisfaction for boys, improves mental health for both boys and girls. The benefits are greater among boys of low socioeconomic backgrounds, who would otherwise be more likely to be exposed to violent and disruptive peers. We find suggestive evidence that the mechanisms driving our findings are consistent with stronger school friendships for boys and better self-image and grades for girls.
34269.zh_abstract: 利用Add Health调查的个人层面数据，我们利用同一学校内不同年级间性别构成的特殊变化，来检验接触更高比例的女性同伴是否会影响心理健康和学校满意度。我们发现，接触更高比例的女性同伴，尽管仅提高了男孩的学校满意度，但改善了男孩和女孩的心理健康。这种益处对于社会经济背景较低的男孩更为显著，否则他们更有可能接触到暴力和具有破坏性的同伴。我们发现了提示性证据，表明驱动我们研究结果的机制与男孩更强的学校友谊以及女孩更好的自我形象和成绩相一致。

34268.title: The Downside of Fertility
34268.abstract: The fertility decline is everywhere in the world today. Moreover, the decline goes decades back in the histories of rich countries. Birthrates have been below replacement in the U.S. and Europe since the mid-1970s, although further declines occurred after the Great Recession. The reasons for the declines from the 1970s to the early 2000s involve greater female autonomy and a mismatch between the desires of men and women. Men benefit more from maintaining traditions; women benefit more from eschewing them. When the probability is low that men will abandon traditions, some career women will not have children and others will delay, often too long. The fertility histories of the U.S. and those of many European and Asian countries speak to the impact of the mismatch on birth rates. The experience of middle income and even poorer nations may also be due to related factors. Various constraints that I group under matching problems have caused fertility to be lower than otherwise and imply that fertility has a “downside.”
34268.zh_abstract: 如今，生育率下降在世界各地普遍存在。此外，这种下降在富裕国家的历史上可以追溯到几十年前。自20世纪70年代中期以来，美国和欧洲的出生率一直低于更替水平，尽管在大衰退之后出现了进一步的下降。从20世纪70年代到21世纪初，生育率下降的原因涉及女性更大的自主权以及男性和女性意愿之间的错配。男性从维持传统中获益更多；女性从摒弃传统中获益更多。当男性放弃传统的可能性较低时，一些职业女性将不会生育孩子，而另一些则会推迟生育，往往推迟得太久。美国以及许多欧洲和亚洲国家的生育率历史说明了这种错配对出生率的影响。中等收入甚至更贫困国家的经历也可能归因于相关因素。我归类为匹配问题的各种约束条件导致生育率低于原本应有的水平，并意味着生育率存在“负面影响”。

34267.title: Dynamic Competition for Sleepy Deposits
34267.authors: Mark L. Egan, Ali Hortaçsu, Nathan A. Kaplan, Adi Sunderam, Vincent Yao
34267.abstract: We examine how “sleepy deposits” affect competition, bank value, and financial stability. Using novel data on account openings and closures at over 900 banks, we show that only 5–15% of depositors open new accounts per year. More closures are driven by moving or death than rate-shopping. We develop an empirical model in which banks face dynamic invest-versus-harvest incentives. We find that depositor sleepiness accounts for 57% of average deposit franchise value, softening competition particularly for banks in low-concentration markets and banks with low-quality services. Sleepiness also enhances financial stability and significantly reduced default probabilities during the 2023 banking turmoil.
34267.zh_abstract: 我们研究了“沉睡存款”如何影响竞争、银行价值和金融稳定。利用超过900家银行账户开立和关闭的新数据，我们显示每年只有5-15%的储户开设新账户。更多的账户关闭是由搬家或死亡驱动的，而非利率比较。我们开发了一个实证模型，其中银行面临动态的“投资与收割”激励。我们发现，储户的沉睡性平均占存款特许权价值的57%，这尤其削弱了低集中度市场银行和低服务质量银行的竞争。沉睡性还增强了金融稳定性，并在2023年银行业动荡期间显著降低了违约概率。

34266.title: Where Collateral Sleeps
34266.authors: Gary B. Gorton, Chase P. Ross, Sharon Y. Ross
34266.abstract: Banks can use the discount window to fend off a run by prepositioning assets with the Fed and borrowing against them. Following the March 2023 bank runs, policymakers have considered mandatory prepositioning, arguably the largest update to the lenderof-last-resort toolkit in over a century. We study the forces that shape the largest banks’ prepositioning. We show that run-prone uninsured-deposit flows causally drive prepositioning and that banks face a prepositioning stigma, even absent borrowing. Prepositioning is no panacea—banks still need good assets to borrow against—but it can help at the margin.
34266.zh_abstract: 银行可以通过将资产预先存放在美联储并以此借款，利用贴现窗口来抵御挤兑。在2023年3月的银行挤兑之后，政策制定者考虑了强制性预先存放，这可以说是一个多世纪以来最后贷款人工具包中最大的一次更新。我们研究了影响最大银行预先存放行为的各种力量。我们表明，易受挤兑的无保险存款流动因果性地驱动了预先存放，并且银行面临预先存放的污名效应，即使在没有借款的情况下也是如此。预先存放并非万能药——银行仍然需要优质资产来借款——但它可以在边际上有所帮助。

34265.title: Prescription for Disaster: The SSDI Rate, Pain, and Prescribing Practices
34265.zh_title: 灾难的处方：SSDI比率、疼痛与处方实践
34265.authors: William N. Evans, Ethan M.J. Lieber
34265.abstract: A county’s fraction of adults in 1990 on Social Security Disability Insurance (SSDI) is a strong predictor of growth in local drug death rates after 2000. The part of the SSDI rate related to drug deaths is not proxying for well-known contributors to the drug crisis, e.g. OxyContin. Instead, it appears to capture the fraction of people in chronic pain. We show that in the late 1990s, physicians began prescribing opioids more aggressively to treat pain. Taken together, our estimates suggest that drug deaths rates would be 43% lower in 2015 had prescribing practices stayed at 1995 levels.
34265.zh_abstract: 一个县在1990年领取社会保障残疾保险（SSDI）的成年人比例，是2000年后当地药物致死率增长的强预测因子。与药物死亡相关的SSDI比率部分，并非代理已知的药物危机促成因素（例如奥施康定）。相反，它似乎捕捉了慢性疼痛人群的比例。我们表明，在1990年代末，医生开始更积极地开具阿片类药物来治疗疼痛。综合来看，我们的估计表明，如果处方实践保持在1995年的水平，2015年的药物致死率将降低43%。

34264.title: Why Is Manufacturing Productivity Growth So Low?
34264.zh_title: 为什么制造业生产率增长如此之低？
34264.authors: Enghin Atalay, Ali Hortaçsu, Nicole Kimmel, Chad Syverson
34264.abstract: We examine the recent slow growth in manufacturing productivity. We show that nearly all measured TFP growth since 1987—and its post-2000s decline—comes from a few computer-related industries. We argue conventional measures understate manufacturing productivity growth by failing to fully capture quality improvements. We compare consumer to producer and import price indices. In rapidly changing industries, consumer price indices indicate less inflation, suggesting mismeasurement in standard industry deflators. Using an input-output framework, we estimate that TFP growth is understated by 1.7 percentage points in durable manufacturing and 0.4 percentage points in nondurable manufacturing, with no mismeasurement in nonmanufacturing industries.
34264.zh_abstract: 我们考察了近期制造业生产率的缓慢增长。我们表明，自1987年以来几乎所有测量的全要素生产率（TFP）增长——以及其2000年代后的下降——都来自少数几个与计算机相关的行业。我们认为，传统衡量标准因未能完全捕捉质量改进而低估了制造业生产率增长。我们比较了消费者价格指数与生产者价格指数及进口价格指数。在快速变化的行业中，消费者价格指数显示通胀较低，这表明标准行业平减指数存在测量误差。利用投入产出框架，我们估计耐用品制造业的全要素生产率增长被低估了1.7个百分点，非耐用品制造业被低估了0.4个百分点，而非制造业行业则不存在测量误差。

34263.title: Inferring Fine-grained Migration Patterns across the United States
34263.zh_title: 推断美国境内细粒度迁移模式
34263.authors: Gabriel Agostini, Rachel Young, Maria D. Fitzpatrick, Nikhil Garg, Emma J. Pierson
34263.abstract: Fine-grained migration data illuminate important demographic, environmental, and health phenomena. However, migration datasets within the United States remain lacking: publicly available Census data are neither spatially nor temporally granular, and proprietary data have higher resolution but demographic and other biases. To address these limitations, we develop a scalable iterative-proportional-fitting based method that reconciles high-resolution but biased proprietary data with low-resolution but more reliable Census data. We apply this method to produce MIGRATE, a dataset of annual migration matrices from 2010-2019 that captures flows between 47.4 billion pairs of Census Block Groups — about four thousand times more granular than publicly available data. These estimates are highly correlated with external ground-truth datasets, and improve accuracy and reduce bias relative to raw proprietary data. We use MIGRATE to analyze both national and local migration patterns. Nationally, we document temporal and demographic variation in homophily, upward mobility, and moving distance: for example, we find that people are increasingly likely to move to top-income-quartile CBGs and identify racial disparities in upward mobility. We also show that MIGRATE can illuminate important local migration patterns, including out-migration in response to California wildfires, that are invisible in coarser previous datasets. We publicly release MIGRATE to provide a resource for migration research in the social, environmental, and health sciences.
34263.zh_abstract: 细粒度迁移数据能揭示重要的人口、环境和健康现象。然而，美国境内的迁移数据集仍然匮乏：公开可用的普查数据在空间和时间上都不够精细，而专有数据虽然分辨率更高，但存在人口统计和其他偏差。为解决这些局限性，我们开发了一种基于可扩展迭代比例拟合的方法，该方法将高分辨率但有偏差的专有数据与低分辨率但更可靠的普查数据进行协调。我们应用此方法生成了MIGRATE数据集，这是一个2010-2019年的年度迁移矩阵数据集，捕捉了474亿对人口普查区块组之间的流动——其精细程度约为公开可用数据的四千倍。这些估计值与外部真实数据集高度相关，并且相对于原始专有数据提高了准确性并减少了偏差。我们利用MIGRATE分析了全国和地方层面的迁移模式。在全国层面，我们记录了同质性、向上流动性和迁移距离在时间和人口统计上的变化：例如，我们发现人们越来越倾向于迁移到收入最高四分位数的区块组，并识别出向上流动性中的种族差异。我们还表明，MIGRATE能够揭示重要的地方迁移模式，包括因应加州野火而迁出的模式，这些模式在较粗糙的先前数据集中是看不见的。我们公开发布MIGRATE，为社会科学、环境科学和健康科学中的迁移研究提供资源。

34262.title: From Kin to Creed: Missions and the Reconfiguration of Social and Moral Order in Colonial Congo
34262.zh_title: 从亲属到信条：殖民刚果的传教活动与社会及道德秩序的重构
34262.abstract: This paper studies how colonial religious institutions reshaped traditional social structures in Africa. Focusing on the Congo, I examine the long-term effects of Christian missions that sought to replace kin-based authority with European-Christian notions of social and moral order. I combine newly digitized data on historical mission locations with an original survey of 975 respondents, measuring attitudes toward family and coethnics, social network composition, referral behavior in a job experiment, and moral values. To address concerns about endogenous mission placement, I construct two counterfactuals: missions that were initially established but later abandoned, and simulated locations that were historically suitable but never selected. I find that exposure to missions persistently reduced bias toward kin and coethnics and weakened the role of kinship ties in networks and referrals. It also eroded communal moral values, such as loyalty to one's group and deference to authority, without a corresponding rise in universal moral principles. Instead, these shifts reflect a redirection of identity and moral obligation from kinship and ethnicity toward religious affiliation. Historical records on mission personnel and infrastructure point to religious instruction and education as key transmission channels. Together, the findings suggest that colonial religious institutions profoundly reshaped the social and moral organization of colonized societies.
34262.zh_abstract: 本文研究殖民时期的宗教机构如何重塑非洲的传统社会结构。聚焦于刚果，我考察了基督教传教活动的长期影响，这些传教活动试图用欧洲-基督教的社会和道德秩序观念取代以亲属为基础的权威。我将新数字化历史传教地点数据与一项针对975名受访者的原始调查相结合，测量对家庭和同族的态度、社交网络构成、工作实验中的推荐行为以及道德价值观。为应对内生性传教地点布局的担忧，我构建了两个反事实：最初建立但后来被废弃的传教点，以及历史上适宜但从未被选中的模拟地点。我发现，接触传教活动持续地减少了对亲属和同族的偏袒，并削弱了亲属关系在网络和推荐中的作用。它还侵蚀了集体道德价值观，例如对群体的忠诚和对权威的服从，而并未伴随普遍道德原则的相应上升。相反，这些转变反映了身份和道德义务从亲属关系和族群向宗教归属的重新定向。关于传教人员和基础设施的历史记录表明，宗教教育和学校教育是关键传导渠道。综合来看，研究结果表明，殖民宗教机构深刻重塑了被殖民社会的社会和道德组织。

34261.title: Congestion Pricing, Carpooling, and Commuter Welfare
34261.zh_title: 拥堵定价、拼车与通勤者福利
34261.abstract: Building on the canonical "bottleneck" model of Vickrey (1969), we show that carpooling and road pricing are highly complementary in addressing traffic congestion: they can be much more effective jointly than each one separately, and can improve commuter welfare without having to rely on the redistribution of government revenue. By contrast, technological advances that make time in traffic more comfortable or productive (e.g., self-driving cars), implemented without additional economic incentives, may result in zero improvement in social welfare.
34261.zh_abstract: 基于Vickrey（1969）经典的“瓶颈”模型，我们表明拼车和道路定价在应对交通拥堵方面具有高度互补性：两者结合使用可能比各自单独使用有效得多，并且可以在不依赖政府收入再分配的情况下改善通勤者福利。相比之下，使交通时间更舒适或更具生产力的技术进步（例如自动驾驶汽车），在没有额外经济激励的情况下实施，可能导致社会福利零改善。
34261.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, PE；JEL：D47, D62, H23, L98, Q58, R41, R48

34260.title: Test-Optional College Admissions: ACT and SAT Scores, Applications, and Enrollment Changes
34260.zh_title: 可选考试大学录取：ACT与SAT分数、申请及入学变化
34260.authors: Christopher Avery, Lena Shi, Preston Magouirk
34260.abstract: This paper uses data from the largest college application platform in the U.S. to describe application and enrollment changes in response to widespread test-optional admissions adoption between 2018-2021. Although test-optional policies aimed to expand college access, underrepresented students did not apply to Elite colleges at higher rates and Elite colleges still received large numbers of high-scoring applications after tests became optional. Despite the oversupply of high-scoring applicants in the test-optional period, Elite colleges enrolled more lower-scorers with high grades, in particular first-generation and lower-income students. Enrollment in less selective colleges also increased among high-scorers, so test-optional policies may exacerbate undermatching.
34260.zh_abstract: 本文利用美国最大大学申请平台的数据，描述了2018-2021年间因应广泛采用可选考试录取政策而出现的申请和入学变化。尽管可选考试政策旨在扩大大学入学机会，但代表性不足的学生并未以更高比例申请精英大学，并且在考试变为可选后，精英大学仍然收到了大量高分申请。尽管在可选考试时期高分申请者供过于求，但精英大学录取了更多成绩较低但高中成绩优异的学生，尤其是第一代大学生和低收入学生。高分学生进入选择性较低大学的入学率也有所增加，因此可选考试政策可能加剧“低配”现象。

34259.title: Artificial Intelligence in Team Dynamics: Who Gets Replaced and Why?
34259.zh_title: 团队动态中的人工智能：谁被取代以及为什么？
34259.authors: Xienan Cheng, Mustafa Dogan, Pinar Yildirim
34259.abstract: This study investigates the effects of artificial intelligence (AI) adoption in organizations. We ask: (1) How should a principal optimally deploy limited AI resources to replace workers in a team? (2) In a sequential workflow, which workers face the highest risk of AI replacement? (3) How does substitution with AI affect both the replaced and non-replaced workers’ wages? We develop a sequential team production model in which a principal can use peer monitoring—where each worker observes the effort of their predecessor—to discipline team members. The principal may replace some workers with AI agents, whose actions are not subject to moral hazard. Our analysis yields four key results. First, the optimal AI strategy stochastically replaces workers rather than fixating on a single position. Second, the principal replaces workers at the beginning and at the end of the workflow, but does not replace the middle worker, since this worker is crucial for sustaining the flow of information obtained by peer monitoring. Third, the principal may optimally underutilize available AI capacity. Fourth, the optimal AI adoption increases average wages and reduces intra-team wage inequality.
34259.zh_abstract: 本研究调查了组织中采用人工智能（AI）的影响。我们提出以下问题：（1）委托人应如何最优地部署有限的AI资源来取代团队中的工人？（2）在顺序工作流程中，哪些工人面临最高的AI替代风险？（3）用AI替代如何影响被替代和未被替代工人的工资？我们开发了一个顺序团队生产模型，其中委托人可以利用同伴监督——即每个工人观察其前任的努力——来约束团队成员。委托人可以用AI代理取代一些工人，AI代理的行为不受道德风险影响。我们的分析得出四个关键结果。首先，最优AI策略是随机地取代工人，而不是固定于某个单一职位。其次，委托人取代工作流程开始和结束时的工人，但不取代中间工人，因为该工人对于维持通过同伴监督获得的信息流至关重要。第三，委托人可能最优地未充分利用可用的AI能力。第四，最优AI采用提高了平均工资并降低了团队内部的工资不平等。
34259.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：D20, L0, M0, M12, M2, M21, M5, M52

34258.title: Scale Economies, Input-Output Loops, and Trade
34258.zh_title: 规模经济、投入产出循环与贸易
34258.authors: Dominick G. Bartelme, Yuyang Jiang, Konstantin Kucheryavyy, Andrés Rodríguez-Clare
34258.abstract: This paper studies the equilibrium and welfare implications of quantitative trade models with sector-level external economies of scale (EES). While empirical evidence highlights the importance of EES, prior work has examined their effects only in models without input-output linkages. Focusing on a small open economy, we derive an intuitive condition for equilibrium uniqueness that links trade elasticities, scale elasticities, and input-output coefficients. We further show that this same condition guarantees positive gains from trade, regardless of a country’s pattern of specialization.
34258.zh_abstract: 本文研究了具有部门层面外部规模经济（EES）的定量贸易模型的均衡和福利含义。虽然经验证据强调了EES的重要性，但先前的研究仅在缺乏投入产出关联的模型中考察了其影响。聚焦于一个小型开放经济体，我们推导出一个直观的均衡唯一性条件，该条件将贸易弹性、规模弹性和投入产出系数联系起来。我们进一步表明，无论一个国家的专业化模式如何，同样的条件保证了贸易的正收益。

34257.title: Monetary-Fiscal Interactions
34257.abstract: Inflation surged in 2021-2023 from a classic fiscal shock: money and debt that financed huge spending, without a plan for repayment. Neither money nor supply shocks offer a coherent alternative explanation. Inflation eased, with no recession, once the fiscal shock was over. Higher interest rates could have brought inflation down earlier, but could not have stopped it. Going forward, higher interest rates will raise debt service costs, and thus perversely raise inflation unless fiscal policy can tighten. High debt and structural deficits also mean that the US may lose the fiscal space to borrow in the next crisis.
34257.zh_abstract: 2021-2023年的通胀飙升源于一个典型的财政冲击：为巨额支出融资的货币和债务，却没有偿还计划。无论是货币冲击还是供给冲击，都无法提供连贯的替代解释。一旦财政冲击结束，通胀便得以缓解，且未伴随经济衰退。更高的利率本可以更早地降低通胀，但无法阻止其发生。展望未来，更高的利率将增加偿债成本，从而反常地推高通胀，除非财政政策能够收紧。高债务和结构性赤字也意味着美国可能在下一次危机中失去借贷的财政空间。

34256.title: A Research Agenda for the Economics of Transformative AI
34256.zh_title: 变革性人工智能经济学的未来研究议程
34256.authors: Erik Brynjolfsson, Anton Korinek, Ajay K. Agrawal
34256.abstract: As we approach Transformative Artificial Intelligence (TAI), there is an urgent need to advance our understanding of how it could reshape our economic models, institutions and policies. We propose a research agenda for the economics of TAI by identifying nine Grand Challenges: economic growth, innovation, income distribution, decision-making power, geoeconomics, information flows, safety risks, human well-being, and transition dynamics. By accelerating work in these areas, researchers can develop insights and tools to help fulfill the economic potential of TAI.
34256.zh_abstract: 随着我们接近变革性人工智能（TAI），迫切需要加深对其如何重塑经济模型、制度和政策的理解。我们通过识别九大挑战来提出TAI经济学的研究议程：经济增长、创新、收入分配、决策权、地缘经济学、信息流、安全风险、人类福祉和转型动态。通过加速这些领域的研究，研究人员可以开发见解和工具，以帮助实现TAI的经济潜力。
34256.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, LS, PR；JEL：A11, O33, O40

34299.title: Who’s Afraid of Tariffs? The Geographic Distribution of Fear and Loss
34299.zh_title: 谁害怕关税？恐惧与损失的地理分布
34299.abstract: On April 2nd 2025, after markets closed, the United States announced steep “Liberation Day” tariffs against most of its trading partners, many of which announced retaliatory tariffs. Market uncertainty spiked, consistent with the magnitudes and scope of the tariffs being unexpected. The prospect of a global trade war sent US stock markets down over ten percent until the US “paused” its tariffs on April 9th 2025, whereupon markets recovered. Portfolios of the stocks of firms headquartered in “redder” (more Republicans per Democrat) counties lost more value during this window.
34299.zh_abstract: 2025年4月2日，在股市收盘后，美国宣布对其大多数贸易伙伴征收高额的“解放日”关税，其中许多贸易伙伴宣布了报复性关税。市场不确定性飙升，这与关税的规模和范围出乎意料是一致的。全球贸易战的前景导致美国股市下跌超过10%，直到美国于2025年4月9日“暂停”其关税，此后市场回升。在此期间，总部位于“更红”（即每个民主党人对应的共和党人更多）县的公司的股票投资组合损失更大。

34298.title: The Traffic Noise Externality: Costs, Incidence and Policy Implications
34298.zh_title: 交通噪音外部性：成本、负担与政策含义
34298.abstract: More than 42 million Americans are exposed to medium or high levels of traffic noise. Despite its potentially large toll and unequal distribution, the economic costs, incidence, and policy implications of traffic noise have received limited attention in economics. We quantify the aggregate economic burden of this externality and its distribution across demographic groups by estimating homebuyers' willingness to pay for quieter environments. Using quasi-experimental variation from the construction of noise barriers, we find that reduced traffic noise exposure leads to significant increases in house prices, implying that buyers are willing to pay a substantial premium for each decibel of noise reduction. In the five years before construction, we detect no differential pre-trends in prices between treated and control properties. Following construction, we observe an immediate and largely permanent 6.8% increase in prices within 100 meters, with smaller gains at greater distances. Information on each barrier's noise attenuation allows us to recover the willingness to pay per decibel of traffic noise. We calculate the aggregate economic cost of traffic noise at $\$110$ billion nationwide. The economic burden is disproportionately borne by lower income and minority households, suggesting that the externality is regressive. The cost varies widely across cities, reflecting differences in noise levels, property values and population density. Based on our estimates, the socially efficient Pigouvian tax amounts to $\$974$ per vehicle. A broad shift to electric vehicles -- which are quieter than traditional vehicles -- could yield noise reduction benefits of $\$77.3$ billion, concentrated among low-income families in dense urban areas.
34298.zh_abstract: 超过4200万美国人暴露在中度或高度的交通噪音中。尽管其潜在代价巨大且分布不均，但交通噪音的经济成本、负担和政策含义在经济学中受到的关注有限。我们通过估计购房者为更安静环境支付的意愿，量化了这种外部性的总经济负担及其在不同人口群体间的分布。利用隔音屏障建设的准实验性变化，我们发现交通噪音暴露的减少导致房价显著上涨，这意味着购房者愿意为每分贝的噪音降低支付可观的溢价。在建设前的五年中，我们检测到处理组和对照组房产之间没有差异性的价格前置趋势。建设后，我们观察到100米内的房价立即且基本永久性地增长了6.8%，在更远距离上收益较小。每个屏障的噪音衰减信息使我们能够推算出每分贝交通噪音的支付意愿。我们计算出全国交通噪音的总经济成本为1100亿美元。经济负担不成比例地由低收入和少数族裔家庭承担，表明这种外部性是累退的。成本在不同城市间差异很大，反映了噪音水平、房产价值和人口密度的差异。根据我们的估计，社会最优的庇古税为每辆车974美元。全面转向电动汽车——其比传统车辆更安静——可以带来773亿美元的降噪收益，这些收益集中在密集城市地区的低收入家庭中。

34297.title: Identity as Self-Image
34297.abstract: We review the economic literature on self-image, which conceptualizes identity as a set of beliefs about one’s core traits, values, goals, and social ties. Self-image concerns lead individuals to process information and make choices in non-standard ways that help affirm and protect certain valued identities. We first present the main cognitive mechanisms involved within a simple unifying framework. We then survey the extensive laboratory, online, and field experimental literature on the nature and behavioral implications of self-image concerns. We discuss in particular how they give rise to information and decision avoidance, motivated memory and beliefs, excuse-driven behavior, preferences for truth-telling, hypothetical bias, moral cleansing and moral licensing, collective identities, political preferences, and other forms of self-signaling or self-deception. We subsequently discuss common empirical strategies used to identify self-image concerns, as well as the threats to their validity and how to alleviate them. We conclude by outlining open questions and directions for future research on the belief-based approach to identity.
34297.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了关于自我形象的经济学文献，该文献将身份概念化为关于个人核心特质、价值观、目标和社会联系的一套信念。自我形象关切导致个体以非标准的方式处理信息和做出选择，这些方式有助于确认和保护某些有价值的身份。我们首先在一个简单的统一框架内介绍所涉及的主要认知机制。然后，我们调查了关于自我形象关切的性质和行为含义的大量实验室、在线和现场实验文献。我们特别讨论了这些关切如何导致信息和决策回避、动机性记忆和信念、借口驱动行为、对说实话的偏好、假设偏差、道德净化与道德许可、集体身份、政治偏好以及其他形式的自我信号或自我欺骗。随后，我们讨论了用于识别自我形象关切的常见实证策略，以及这些策略有效性的威胁和如何减轻这些威胁。最后，我们概述了关于基于信念的身份研究方法的开放性问题及未来研究方向。

34296.title: Social Learning among Urban Manufacturing Firms: Energy-Efficient Motors in Bangladesh
34296.zh_title: 城市制造业企业间的社会学习：孟加拉国的节能电机
34296.authors: Ritam Chaurey, Gaurav Nayyar, Siddharth Sharma, Eric Verhoogen
34296.abstract: Knowledge spillovers among firms are widely viewed as a key driver of agglomeration and growth, but are difficult to estimate cleanly. We randomly allocated an energy-efficient motor --- a “servo'” motor --- among leather-goods firms in Dhaka, Bangladesh, and tracked adoption, information flows, beliefs about energy savings, and other variables. We use the difference between actual exposure and expected exposure (from simulated randomization draws) to identify the effect of exposure. We find a robust positive effect of exposure to treated neighbors within a small geographic area (500 meters in our baseline specification) on information flows and adoption. A marginal value of public funds (MVPF) calculation taking learning spillovers into account yields a significantly larger value than one considering only treated firms and suggests that adoption subsidies would be a cost-effective policy intervention.
34296.zh_abstract: 企业间的知识溢出被广泛视为集聚和增长的关键驱动力，但很难进行干净的估计。我们在孟加拉国达卡的皮革制品企业中随机分配了一种节能电机——一种“伺服”电机，并追踪了采用情况、信息流动、关于节能的信念以及其他变量。我们利用实际暴露与预期暴露（来自模拟随机化抽取）之间的差异来识别暴露效应。我们发现，在一个小地理区域（我们的基准设定中为500米）内，接触处理过的邻居对信息流动和采用具有稳健的正向效应。考虑学习溢出效应的公共资金边际价值（MVPF）计算得出的数值显著大于仅考虑处理企业的计算值，这表明采用补贴将是一种具有成本效益的政策干预。
34296.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI, PR；JEL：L23, L67, O12, O14, R11

34295.title: AI and Task Efficiency
34295.abstract: We model several ways in which AI may improve decisions, raise the productivity of firms, and raise human capital growth. Each focuses on activities that involve problem solving, with solutions being guided by signals. If AI raises the accuracy of the signals, humans will then make better decisions — individually and in groups.
34295.zh_abstract: 我们建模了人工智能可能改善决策、提高企业生产率以及促进人力资本增长的几种方式。每种方式都侧重于涉及问题解决的活动，其中解决方案由信号引导。如果人工智能提高了信号的准确性，那么人类将做出更好的决策——无论是个人决策还是群体决策。

34294.title: A Study of the Microdynamics of Early Childhood Learning
34294.zh_title: 幼儿学习微观动态研究
34294.abstract: This paper investigates the weekly evolution of child skills as measured by unique data from a widely-emulated early childhood home-visiting program developed in Jamaica, adapted to rural China, and applied in different versions worldwide. The design of the study avoids problems of endogeneity of inputs and lack of truly comparable measures of skills across children that plague previous econometric studies of child development. Skills that are nominally classified as the same, in fact, do not appear to share a common unit scale across levels. They are produced by skill-specific, lifecycle-stage-specific technologies. We formulate and estimate a new dynamic stochastic skill production model for multiple skills that is consistent with the evidence. We quantify the dynamics of early life learning. The model explains the “fadeout” of measures of learning by the emergence of new skills not properly measured. We investigate the role of ability in learning. We find important differences in learning patterns between boys and girls.
34294.zh_abstract: 本文利用来自一个广泛效仿的幼儿家访项目的独特数据，调查了儿童技能的每周演变。该项目最初在牙买加开发，后适应中国农村，并在全球以不同版本应用。研究设计避免了投入内生性问题以及儿童间技能缺乏真正可比衡量标准的问题，这些问题困扰着以往的儿童发展计量经济学研究。名义上归类为相同的技能，实际上在不同水平上似乎并不共享共同的单位尺度。它们是由特定技能、特定生命周期阶段的技术所生产的。我们构建并估计了一个新的、与证据一致的、针对多种技能的动态随机技能生产模型。我们量化了早期学习的动态。该模型通过新技能的出现（这些技能未被恰当衡量）来解释学习衡量指标的“消退”。我们研究了能力在学习中的作用。我们发现男孩和女孩在学习模式上存在重要差异。
34294.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED；JEL：C5, C9, D2, I30, J1, O12

34293.title: Improving Judicial Protection in Intimate Partner Violence Cases: The Role of Specialized Courts and Judges
34293.zh_title: 改善亲密伴侣暴力案件中的司法保护：专门法庭和法官的作用
34293.authors: Carolina Arteaga, Gustavo J. Bobonis, Paola Salardi, Dario Toman
34293.abstract: We study the large-scale implementation of a system of specialized domestic violence courts (SDVCs), an innovation in access to justice programs for potential victims of intimate partner violence (IPV) and offenders. Using individual-level administrative data from the universe of civil domestic violence cases in Puerto Rico during the period 2014-2020, we leverage the staggered opening of SDVCs across judicial regions to examine the consequences for victims’ judicial protection and offender recidivism. Access to SDVCs leads to a considerable 8 percentage points increase in the probability that judges issue a protection order and a 1.7 percentage point (15 percent) decrease in victim and offender reappearance rates within one year of the start of the case. Effects are more pronounced for cases in which parties have children in common and in which access to SDVCs is more limited. Linking the case data to administrative and survey data on judges, we show that the priorities of judges assigned to SDVCs play a prominent role in explaining these outcomes.
34293.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个专门家庭暴力法庭（SDVC）系统的大规模实施，这是为亲密伴侣暴力（IPV）潜在受害者和施暴者提供司法救助项目的一项创新。利用2014-2020年期间波多黎各所有民事家庭暴力案件的个体层面行政数据，我们利用SDVC在各司法区域交错开设的情况，来考察其对受害者司法保护和施暴者再犯的影响。获得SDVC服务使得法官签发保护令的概率显著提高了8个百分点，并在案件开始后一年内使受害者和施暴者再次出庭率下降了1.7个百分点（15%）。对于双方有共同子女的案件以及获得SDVC服务更受限的案件，影响更为显著。通过将案件数据与法官的行政和调查数据相关联，我们表明，被分配到SDVC的法官的优先事项在解释这些结果方面起着突出作用。

34292.title: Assessing Career Attainment via a Non-Wage Measure
34292.zh_title: 通过非工资指标评估职业成就
34292.authors: Natee Amornsiripanitch, Paul Gompers, George Hu, Will Levinson, Vladimir Mukharlyamov, Sachin Srivastava
34292.abstract: This paper proposes a non-pecuniary measure of career achievement, seniority. Based on a database of over 150 million resumes, this metric exploits the variation in how long it takes workers to attain job titles. A person’s seniority is defined as the number of years it takes the median individual—within the same industry and firm size category—to achieve that person’s job title. Seniority aligns with standard markers of success—it is positively correlated with both wages and educational attainment. To demonstrate its value as a measure of career progression, we show that individuals with higher seniority levels in the public sector are more likely to transition to higher-paying positions in the private sector. When non-monetary factors influence career choice, evaluating labor market outcomes using non-wage measures, such as seniority, offers significant advantages.
34292.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种非金钱的职业成就衡量指标：资历。基于一个包含超过1.5亿份简历的数据库，该指标利用了工人获得职位头衔所需时间的差异。一个人的资历被定义为，在同一行业和相同企业规模类别中，中位个体达到该人职位头衔所需的年数。资历与成功的标准指标一致——它与工资和教育程度均呈正相关。为了证明其作为职业发展衡量指标的价值，我们表明，公共部门中资历水平较高的个体更有可能转向私营部门中薪酬更高的职位。当非金钱因素影响职业选择时，使用诸如资历之类的非工资指标来评估劳动力市场结果具有显著优势。

34291.title: A Nascent International Financial Channel of China’s Monetary Policy Transmission
34291.zh_title: 中国货币政策传导的新兴国际金融渠道
34291.authors: Chang Ma, Alessandro Rebucci, Sili Zhou
34291.abstract: Chinese private portfolio equity outflows, though small compared to other Chinese outflows, are growing rapidly because of capital account liberalization and capital flight. Using granular stock-holding data on Qualified Domestic Institutional Investor (QDII) mutual funds, we identify a nascent financial channel of international transmission of Chinese monetary policy to world stocks. Event study analysis around monetary policy announcement days reveals that monetary policy tightening depresses returns of country equity indexes and individual U.S. stocks with QDII fund exposure relative to non-exposed stocks. The results are robust to controlling for the real transmission channel of Chinese monetary policy and other confounders. The effect is driven by smaller and less liquid firms, but not by China-concept stocks or those highly exposed to China's macroeconomic shocks. We also find that the results are driven by household portfolio rebalancing from more to less risky assets following the announcement.
34291.zh_abstract: 中国私人投资组合的股权流出，尽管与其他中国流出相比规模较小，但由于资本账户自由化和资本外逃而快速增长。利用合格境内机构投资者（QDII）共同基金的细粒度持股数据，我们识别出一个新兴的金融渠道，通过该渠道中国货币政策向全球股票进行国际传导。围绕货币政策公告日的事件研究分析表明，货币政策紧缩会压低有QDII基金敞口的国家股指和个股（相对于无敞口股票）的回报率。该结果在控制中国货币政策的实际传导渠道和其他混杂因素后依然稳健。这种效应由规模较小、流动性较差的公司驱动，而非中国概念股或高度暴露于中国宏观经济冲击的股票。我们还发现，这些结果是由公告后家庭投资组合从较高风险资产向较低风险资产再平衡所驱动的。

34290.title: Optimal Dynamic Spatial Policy
34290.authors: Eric Donald, Masao Fukui, Yuhei Miyauchi
34290.abstract: We study the optimal allocation of population and consumption in a dynamic spatial general equilibrium model with frictional migration, where households' idiosyncratic location preference shocks are private information. We derive a recursive formula for the constrained-efficient allocation, capturing the trade-off between consumption smoothing and efficient migration. In a quantitative model calibrated to the US economy featuring both cross-state migration and risk-free savings, we find that the constrained-efficient allocation features lower population but higher average consumption in less productive states than the status quo, achieving efficiency and spatial redistribution simultaneously through dynamic incentives. In response to local negative productivity shocks, the constrained-efficient allocation features more front-loaded consumption than the status quo, with systematic heterogeneity linked to the location’s pre-shock fundamentals.
34290.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在存在摩擦性迁移的动态空间一般均衡模型中，人口和消费的最优配置，其中家庭异质性的区位偏好冲击是私人信息。我们推导出约束有效配置的递归公式，捕捉了消费平滑与有效迁移之间的权衡。在一个以美国经济为校准的定量模型中，该模型同时包含跨州迁移和无风险储蓄，我们发现，与现状相比，约束有效配置的特征是生产率较低州的人口更少但平均消费更高，通过动态激励同时实现了效率和空间再分配。为应对当地负向生产率冲击，约束有效配置的特征是消费比现状更前置，且存在与区位冲击前基本面相关的系统性异质性。

34289.title: Beliefs and Realities of Work and Childcare After Childbirth
34289.zh_title: 产后工作与育儿：信念与现实
34289.authors: Andrew Caplin, Søren Leth-Petersen, Christopher Tonetti
34289.abstract: When women plan for life after childbirth, they form beliefs about work, childcare, and how their careers will unfold. These expectations shape key decisions but are formed under deep uncertainty. We use a 2019 state-contingent survey of 11,000 Danish women linked to administrative data to compare pre-birth beliefs to realized outcomes. Mothers accurately anticipate their eventual return to work but underestimate the duration of the career interruption. This miscalibration stems from two belief errors—about partner leave and own labor supply—which interact and persist even among second-time mothers, with implications for labor supply, planning, and policy design.
34289.zh_abstract: 当女性规划产后生活时，她们会形成关于工作、育儿以及职业生涯如何展开的信念。这些预期塑造了关键决策，但都是在深度不确定性下形成的。我们利用一项针对11000名丹麦女性的2019年状态依存调查，并将其与行政数据相关联，以比较产前信念与实现结果。母亲们准确预测了她们最终重返工作的时间，但低估了职业中断的持续时间。这种校准错误源于两种信念误差——关于伴侣休假和自身劳动供给的误差——这两种误差相互影响，甚至在二胎母亲中依然存在，并对劳动供给、规划和政策设计具有启示意义。
34289.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：D84, E24, J13, J22

34288.title: Permanent Capital Losses after Banking Crises
34288.zh_title: 银行业危机后的永久性资本损失
34288.authors: Matthew Baron, Luc Laeven, Julien Pénasse, Yevhenii Usenko
34288.abstract: We study the mechanisms driving bank losses across historical banking crises in 46 economies and the effectiveness of policy interventions in restoring bank capitalization. We find that bank stocks experience large, permanent declines at the onset of crises. These losses predict commensurate long-term declines in banks’ earnings and dividends, rather than elevated future equity returns. Bank losses are primarily driven by write-downs of nonperforming assets, not asset sales during panics. Forceful liquidity-based interventions during crises predict only small, temporary increases in bank market value. Overall, these results suggest that bank losses during crises are not primarily due to temporary price dislocations. Early liquidity interventions can avert banking crises, but only under specific conditions. Once large bank equity declines have occurred, policy responses have historically failed to prevent persistent undercapitalization in the banking sector.
34288.zh_abstract: 我们研究了46个经济体历史上银行业危机中驱动银行损失的机制，以及旨在恢复银行资本充足率的政策干预的有效性。我们发现，银行股票在危机爆发时会出现大规模、永久性的下跌。这些损失预示着银行盈利和股息的相应长期下降，而非未来股票回报率的上升。银行损失主要由不良资产减记驱动，而非恐慌期间的资产抛售。危机期间强有力的流动性干预仅能预测银行市场价值的小幅、暂时性增长。总体而言，这些结果表明，危机期间的银行损失并非主要源于暂时的价格错位。早期的流动性干预可以避免银行业危机，但仅在特定条件下有效。一旦发生大规模的银行股权下跌，历史上的政策应对未能阻止银行业持续性的资本不足。

34287.title: Türkiye's Homemade Crises
34287.abstract: Türkiye's response to post-pandemic inflation is a cautionary tale of how political pressure for low interest rates can create macroeconomic instabilities. While central banks worldwide raised interest rates to combat inflation in 2021-2023, Turkish authorities pursued the opposite strategy: cutting real rates to deeply negative levels while implementing financial engineering tools, FX interventions, and financial repression to stabilize markets. The centerpiece was a novel FX-protected deposit scheme (KKM) that guaranteed depositors against currency depreciation, shifting exchange rate risk to the government balance sheet. We provide a detailed account of this policy experiment and develop a theoretical model focusing on how KKM functions and creates vulnerabilities. Our model reveals that pressure to keep interest rates below inflation-targeting levels can lead to an interconnected destabilizing sequence. Low rates generate inflation, current account deficits, and exchange rate depreciation. KKM provides partial stabilization by effectively raising rates for savers while maintaining low rates for borrowers. However, this creates growing contingent fiscal burdens and vulnerability to self-fulfilling currency and sovereign debt crises. This explains additional policies adopted including capital flow management, financial repression, and return to orthodox monetary policy. As central banks worldwide face renewed pressure to set lower policy rates, Türkiye's experience illustrates the consequences.
34287.zh_abstract: 土耳其对疫情后通胀的应对是一个警示故事，说明了低利率的政治压力如何造成宏观经济不稳定。当全球央行在2021-2023年加息以对抗通胀时，土耳其当局采取了相反策略：将实际利率大幅降至负值，同时实施金融工程工具、外汇干预和金融抑制以稳定市场。其核心是一项新颖的外汇保护存款计划（KKM），该计划为储户提供免受货币贬值的保障，将汇率风险转移至政府资产负债表。我们详细描述了这一政策实验，并开发了一个理论模型，聚焦于KKM如何运作并制造脆弱性。我们的模型揭示，将利率维持在低于通胀目标水平的压力可能导致一系列相互关联的不稳定连锁反应。低利率引发通胀、经常账户赤字和汇率贬值。KKM通过有效提高储户利率同时维持借款人低利率，提供了部分稳定。然而，这造成了不断增长的或有财政负担，以及对自我实现的货币和主权债务危机的脆弱性。这解释了随后采取的其他政策，包括资本流动管理、金融抑制以及回归正统货币政策。随着全球央行面临再次设定较低政策利率的压力，土耳其的经验说明了其后果。
34287.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E43, E52, E58, F31, F32, F41

34286.title: Nature and Biodiversity Loss: A Research Agenda for Financial Economics
34286.zh_title: 自然与生物多样性丧失：金融经济学的研究议程
34286.authors: Stefano Giglio, Theresa Kuchler, Johannes Stroebel, Olivier Wang
34286.abstract: We outline a research agenda to better understand the economic and financial consequences of nature and biodiversity loss. Our starting point is a simple model in which ecosystem services—such as pollination, water filtration, and carbon sequestration—enter economic production, and where nature degradation and climate change reinforce one another through a “Twin-Crises Multiplier.” We then extend this framework to allow for heterogeneity across firms, industries, and geographies in how they depend on, and in turn affect, nature. This broader perspective provides a foundation for empirical analyses of how biodiversity loss influences aggregate output, firm productivity, and financial risk. We conclude by identifying opportunities for asset pricing and corporate finance research to systematically incorporate nature and biodiversity into financial economics.
34286.zh_abstract: 我们概述了一个研究议程，以更好地理解自然和生物多样性丧失的经济与金融后果。我们的起点是一个简单模型，其中生态系统服务——如授粉、水过滤和碳封存——进入经济生产，并且自然退化与气候变化通过一个“双重危机乘数”相互强化。然后，我们扩展这一框架，以考虑企业、行业和地区在如何依赖自然以及如何影响自然方面的异质性。这一更广阔的视角为实证分析奠定了基础，以研究生物多样性丧失如何影响总产出、企业生产率和金融风险。最后，我们识别出资产定价和公司金融研究的机会，以系统地将自然和生物多样性纳入金融经济学。
34286.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE, EFG, PE；JEL：G0, G12, Q30, Q50

34285.title: Monotone Ecological Inference
34285.authors: Hadi Elzayn, Jacob Goldin, Cameron Guage, Daniel E. Ho, Claire Morton
34285.abstract: We study monotone ecological inference, a partial identification approach to ecological inference. The approach exploits information about one or both of the following conditional associations: (1) outcome differences between groups within the same neighborhood, and (2) outcomes differences within the same group across neighborhoods with different group compositions. We show how assumptions about the sign of these conditional associations, whether individually or in relation to one another, can yield informative sharp bounds in ecological inference settings. We illustrate our proposed approach using county-level data to study differences in Covid-19 vaccination rates among Republicans and Democrats in the United States.
34285.zh_abstract: 我们研究单调生态推断，这是一种生态推断的部分识别方法。该方法利用了关于以下一种或两种条件关联的信息：（1）同一社区内不同群体之间的结果差异，以及（2）同一群体在不同群体构成社区之间的结果差异。我们展示了关于这些条件关联符号的假设——无论是单独考虑还是相互关联——如何在生态推断设定中产生信息丰富的锐界。我们使用县级数据来说明我们提出的方法，以研究美国共和党人和民主党人之间新冠疫苗接种率的差异。
34285.meta: Programs：LS, POL, TWP；JEL：C1, C10, C13, C18, C21
